title: The Hockey Captain That Hates Me
genre: Campus Lovers, Love-Hate, Revenge, Hidden Feelings, Competition, Hooking-up
synopsis_or_hook: Plus-size figure skater Skylar Carter hates the arrogant hockey team captain, Mason Reed, with good reason. When Skylar’s prank against the team leaves Mason injured, she’s forced to be his assistant or risk losing her own sports future. Forced together, their rivalry turns into undeniable chemistry. But after the school announces only one program will survive to next season, Skylar and Mason may be falling for the one person whose victory could destroy their dreams.

title: Breaking My Bodyguard
genre: Royalty/Nobility, Campus Lovers, Hidden Feelings, First Love, Friendship, Adventure
synopsis_or_hook: Vera Marchesa just wants one thing: freedom from the dangerous mafia world she grew up in, and her overprotective bodyguard Dante, who refuses to love her. Determined to prove she's not a helpless princess, Vera pushes the one line Dante swore never to cross… even if that means they will crash and burn together.

title: My Alpha Boss Gave Me Triplets
genre: Modern, Workplace, Romantic, Forbidden Love, Emotional, Possessive
synopsis_or_hook: Evie, a talented but vulnerable human designer, becomes bound to Leopold, the ruthless Alpha of the Stonehearth Pack, leaving her pregnant with his rare triplets. To protect her, Leopold forces her to move in with him, presenting their relationship as purely transactional while privately struggling with uncontrollable mate-bond instincts that cause him to share Evie's pain and emotions. As Evie is drawn into Leopold’s corporate and pack world, Darleen, a powerful she-wolf from another pack determined to claim Leopold, escalates from professional threats to phsyical ones. Evie's estranged family piles on by attempting to kidnap her. Will Leopold be able to prioritize his mate over everything, and save her from the whirlwind he brought her into?

title: I Accidentally Sexted My Enemy
genre: Playboy, Possessive, Wallflower, Athlete, Contract Lovers, Neighbors
synopsis_or_hook: In I Accidentally Sexted My Enemy Episode 1, Evelyn is about to confess her feelings through writing a love letter to Vincent. Yet, her actual crush, Vincent, only appears after her arch-nemesis, Colton, and some other bullies haze and expose her. Once she wears her suggestive-looking underwear, will it be Vincent or Colton noticing her?

title: Double Life of a Cell Block King
genre: Independent Woman, Job Seeker, Strong-Willed, Hidden Identity, Love After Marriage, Business
synopsis_or_hook: Harrison had deliberately gone to prison to gather the evidence he needed to take back everything that's owed to him. In Double Life of a Cell Block King Episode 1, 117 days into prison, he finally met his fiancée Bianca, who dumped him for Xavier, his half-brother. Betrayed, Harrison got out of prison, vowing to make them pay. What happens next?

title: Alpha Daddy Make Me Yours
genre: Billionaire, Hot Daddy/DILF, Werewolf, Single Dad, Age Gap, Taboo
synopsis_or_hook: Lyra was spending the summer with her best friend Tasha in Alpha Daddy Make Me Yours Episode 1. She shared all her dirty secrets and dreams with Tasha except for her secret crush on Tasha's dad, Alpha Damon. But Arya's secret comes close to being exposed when Tasha discovers a picture of the three with a heart drawn on Damon's face. What happens next?

title: Taming My Bullies 3
genre: Strong-Willed, Jock, Love Triangle, Enemies to Lovers, Amnesia, Breakup
synopsis_or_hook: The doctor team's statement about Rowan's head trauma in the Taming My Bullies 3 Episode 1 saddens not only Emma, but also Victoria. Not only does Victoria ask her assistants to get the best neurologist, but she also prevents Emma, Karl, and Liam from seeing Rowan. Is it what Victoria wants when Rowan wakes up, forgetting Emma?

title: Dark Notes
genre: Teacher, Taboo, Age Gap, Hidden Feelings, Secret, Love at First Sight
synopsis_or_hook: Ivory was abused by her brother Shane in Dark Notes Episode 1. Luckily she was saved by a handsome yet kind stranger. She was drawn to the man, unaware he was her new professor. What happens next? Check out the latest episodes now!

title: The Imperfect Marriage
genre: CEO, Love Triangle, Flash Marriage, Age Gap, Caught Cheating, Getting Back at Ex
synopsis_or_hook: Based on the novel by L. Steele. After her fiancé cheats on her, Vivian flash marries a hot silver fox… only to realize he’s her ex’s dad. The deal is simple: two weeks of marriage, a CEO title for Quentin and enough money for Vivian to save her sick dad. But as her ex keeps humiliating her and his dad keeps saving her, Vivian's fake marriages starts to cross very real lines.

title: Campus Saga: Superpower Teen
genre: Heiress/Socialite, Jock, Super Power, Campus Lovers, Revenge, Hooking-up
synopsis_or_hook: Brian struggles with his nervousness to ask Mia out in the Campus Saga Superpower Teen Episode 1's stories. Yet, he no longer hesitates once Mia signals him to go inside the school for a supposedly ONS session. So, is it the trap Mia sets up against him when everybody else suddenly shoots his naked photo?

title: CEO's Twins Want Mommy Back
genre: Workplace, USA, Apartment, Mall, Hospital, Office
synopsis_or_hook: Cassandra Mortensen gave birth to a boy and a girl in CEO's Twins Want Mommy Back Episode 1. She had previously been disowned by her father, who wanted Cassandra to lose the kids. However, Cassandra called her father out for his affair behind her mother's back, leading up to her getting disowned. Who was the father to Cassandra's twins?

title: Rose in Chains
genre: Rosa Singerman, Rhett Wellington, Janine Czajka, Paul Addison, Crime Lord, Artist
synopsis_or_hook: Hate has chained their fates together, love is the only key. Mafia Boss Liam swore to destroy the man that killed his father, even keeping his daughter Rose captive. Torn between his thirst for revenge and obsessive fascination with the fallen heiress, Liam finds himself just as much a prisoner to Rose. When the bloody truth behind their past is finally revealed, they realize they were never meant for devastating hatred, but instead love.

title: My Brothers Begged, But I'm the Dragon's Queen
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: In the Frostmark Empire, locked in eternal winter, only a marriage between a princess of pure royal blood and the Abyss Dragon can bring back the warmth of the sun. Princess Diana grew up happy alongside her three brothers — until Lorelei arrived. Using a stolen Dragon's scale, Lorelei seized all of Diana's love and standing. Deceived, the three brothers cast Diana aside — even offering her as a sacrifice to slay the dragon. Only after the dragon took Diana away did the truth emerge. By then, it was too late.

title: A Penny for His Revenge
genre: Billionaire, Strong-Willed, Mute, CEO, Business, All-Too-Late
synopsis_or_hook: Charlie was abandoned by his wealthy family as a baby, left for dead in a fire. 25 years later, his family comes looking for him. Finally, he'll get to have a real family! As a smart genius, he helps the family business grow by billions. But when it comes time to pass out the bonuses, his fake brother gets millions, but they only hand him a penny. Is this what his family truly thinks about him? When will he stand up and take back what truly belongs to him?

title: The Arena(updating)
synopsis_or_hook: Tana is the LAST fire dragon alive—and she's hiding that secret in a cage where the losers DIE. Every night Tana heals Cedric, the wolf king locked beside her, never knowing he's her fated mate. But the second Cedric marks her and finds out she's no wolf, he LEAVES her—pregnant and alone. Now Tana is raising Cedric's secret daughter in the city… while Cedric tears apart every mountain looking for the mate he threw away.

title: The CEO and Her Daughter's Secret Father
genre: Nick Puya, Nikki Leigh, Scarlett Shields, Jonah Robinson, Drama, Comeback Story
synopsis_or_hook: Connor Reed, the world's most powerful arms dealer, saves Charlotte Hayes and spends the night with her while undercover. Four years later, still in hiding, Charlotte shows up... with his son. Now Connor must protect them both... without revealing his true identity.

title: La CEO y El Padre Secreto De Su Hija
genre: Nick Puya, Nikki Leigh, Scarlett Shields, Jonah Robinson, Drama, Comeback Story
synopsis_or_hook: Emilio Salinas, el traficante de armas más poderoso del mundo, salva a Renata Reyes y pasa la noche con ella mientras está encubierto. Cuatro años después, mientras sigue escondido, Renata aparece... con su hija. Ahora Emilio debe protegerlas a ambas... sin revelar su verdadera identidad.

title: Caged by His Twisted Love
genre: Abigail Fawn, Marc Herrmann, Matteo Della Putta, James Alan Bacon, Crime Lord, Journalist
synopsis_or_hook: Nora Harrison thought she killed mafia boss Luca Moretti. But he survives and resurfaces as a billionaire investor, trapping her in his world and forces Nora into a dangerous game: become his woman or lose everything she loves.

title: Too Late, My Rejected Mate
genre: Rebirth, Second Chance, Romance, Second Chance, Betrayal, werewolf
synopsis_or_hook: Selene, the noble Lycan Princess, loved the East Coast Alpha Caleb for eighteen years, only to be betrayed, drained of her blood, and brutally murdered by him and his Omega lover, Elara, in her past life. Miraculously reborn on the night of the Blood Moon Altar, Selene refuses to make the same mistake. Instead of Caleb, she chooses Kael, an Alpha bound by a dark witch's curse. Forced to endure Caleb's arrogant humiliations and cruelties under the temporary effects of a secrecy potion, Selene patiently bides her time. With Kael ultimately breaking his curse to become an unmatched ancient Lycan, will Selene successfully rewrite her tragic fate, expose the traitors, and claim her throne as the ultimate Lycan Queen?

title: Bound to My Three Fated High Lords
genre: Royalty/Nobility, Vampire, Werewolf, Student, Strong-Willed, Reincarnation
synopsis_or_hook:
Three hundred years ago, Evelyn, the Supreme Witch, sealed the Demon King Lucifer in the underworld and reincarnated as Ivy, an orphan with feeble spiritual power. Seventeen years later, Lucifer’s minions infiltrated Silver Thorn Academy, plotting to awaken the Demon King through a dark magic circle.
After enrolling in the academy, Ivy formed fateful bonds with Kane, the Alpha Werewolf, Sebastian, the Vampire Patriarch, and Victor, the Demon Hunter Mentor — the three chosen guardians of the demon core. Lucifer set a trap to kill Ivy before her power awakened, but it instead triggered her dormant supreme abilities. Heirs of the three great clans joined forces to fight the Demon King, and Ivy, regaining her full power, banished Lucifer back to the abyss once more.

title: The Return of the Lost Striker
genre: Drama, Family Drama, Modern, Father-and-Son, Sports, Violent
synopsis_or_hook: When André Brandão, son of famous NFL quarterback Thiago Brandão and former beauty queen Cristina, disappears in a devastating fire, the psychotic fan Dinho sees an opportunity to swap André for his own son, Vitor. Twelve years later, the two boys meet at soccer tryouts, where André surpasses Vitor. The Brandão family, unaware that André is their long-lost son, relentlessly attack him. They subject him to physical and mental torture, encouraged by their adopted son. Until they discover the shocking truth—André is the one they were looking for. The Brandão family then do everything to beg for forgiveness while Vitor and Dinho plot revenge.

title: แม่ของมหาเศรษฐีพันล้าน ไม่ใช่คนธรรมดา
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook:
โรเจอร์ ประธานกลุ่มบริษัทเวสต์ดรีมมูลค่าหลายล้านล้าน ต้องการทำสิ่งพิเศษให้แม่เลี้ยงเดี่ยวของตน และพาคู่หมั้นสาว วิเวียน มาแนะนำให้รู้จัก เขาจึงรับซูซาน แม่ผู้ทำงานในร้านอาหารเล็ก ๆ ต่างจังหวัด เข้ามาฉลองวันเกิดในเมือง

แต่ลิซ่า ลูกพี่ลูกน้องของวิเวียนที่ไม่รู้ตัวตนที่แท้จริงของซูซาน กลับเข้าใจผิดว่าเธอเป็นขโมยและดูหมิ่นเธอ ต่อมาวิเวียนเองก็เข้าใจผิด คิดว่าซูซานเป็นพวกต้มตุ๋นและคอยเหยียดหยาม ซูซานพยายามอธิบายความจริงหลายครั้ง แต่ไม่มีใครเชื่อ

หลังจากถูกดูหมิ่นซ้ำแล้วซ้ำเล่า ในที่สุดโรเจอร์ก็มาช่วยเธอไว้ ทุกคนจึงรู้ว่าหญิงธรรมดาคนนี้คือแม่ของโรเจอร์จริง ๆ แต่ทุกอย่างก็สายเกินกว่าจะเสียใจ โรเจอร์ตัดสินใจลงโทษผู้ที่รังแกแม่ และทวงศักดิ์ศรีของเธอกลับคืนมา।

title: La Mère Exceptionnelle du Milliardaire
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Roger, à la tête de l'empire WestDream, invite sa mère célibataire Susan, modeste serveuse, à le rejoindre en ville pour son anniversaire. Mais voilà que Lisa, la cousine de sa fiancée Vivian, l'accuse de vol et que sa future belle-fille elle-même la piétine. La vérité finit par éclater, trop tard pour les remords : Roger fera payer cher à chacun le mal infligé à sa mère.

title: O Retorno do Atacante Perdido
genre: Drama, Family Drama, Modern, Father-and-Son, Sports, Violent
synopsis_or_hook: Quando André Brandão, filho do famoso quarterback da NFL Thiago Brandão e da ex-rainha da beleza Cristina, desaparece em um incêndio devastador, o fã psicótico Dinho vê uma oportunidade de trocar André por seu próprio filho, Vitor. Doze anos depois, os dois garotos se encontram em testes de futebol, onde André supera Vitor. Os Brandão, sem perceber que André é seu filho perdido, o atacam implacavelmente. Eles o submetem a torturas físicas e mentais, incentivados por seu filho adotivo. Até que descobrem a verdade chocante—André é quem eles procuravam. Os Brandão então fazem de tudo para implorar por perdão enquanto Vitor e Dinho planejam vingança.

title: Daddy! Please Save Mommy
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: "Dad!" One day, a child who suddenly appeared shook Muhyeok's world. It was the child born from his first love, Hyerin, whom he believed had betrayed him and left. He thought that his only duty was to get Hyerin out of prison for the sake of the child, but the moment he faced Hyerin's haggard face, everything crumbled. Unjust imprisonment, years of accumulated resentment, and even cruel sacrifices... To protect the child from the forces behind the rift that drove them apart, Muhyeok now intends to stake everything and stand by her side.

title: DADDY - 엄마를 구해주세요!
genre: Second Chance, Asian (Korean), First Love, Secret Child, Reunion Years Later, Reunion
synopsis_or_hook: ""아빠!"" 어느 날 갑자기 나타난 아이가 무혁의 세계를 뒤흔들었다. 무혁을 배신하고 떠났다 믿었던 첫사랑, 혜린과의 사이에서 태어난 아이였다.  그저 아이를 위해, 혜린을 감옥에서 꺼내 주는 것, 자신이 할 일은 거기까지라고 생각했지만 혜린의 초췌한 얼굴을 마주한 순간 모든 게 무너졌다. 억울한 옥살이와 수년간 쌓인 원망, 그리고 잔인한 희생까지.. 두 사람을 갈라놓았던 배후로부터 아이를 지키기 위해, 무혁은 이제 모든 것을 걸고 그녀의 편에 서려 한다.

title: ホームレス婚  彼の正体は億万長者!?
genre: Seth Edeen, Patrick Wade, Nicole Mattox, Audrey Fafard, Romance, Sweet Romance
synopsis_or_hook: 彩音は婚約者の誠司と結婚する予定だったが、彼がいとこの玲奈と浮気するという非常に残酷な仕打ちを受け、裏切られてしまう。余命わずかな祖母を安心させるため、彩音は自分が優しく援助してきたホームレスの男性、颯斗との結婚に渋々同意する。しかし、颯斗はただのホームレスなどでは決してなかった。なんと彼はハンサムで魅力的な億万長者であり、さらには国内トップ企業「城崎グループ」のCEOだったのだ。颯斗と共に実家へ戻った彩音は、自分を見下す傲慢な元恋人の誠司や意地悪な親戚たちと対峙する。圧倒的な財力と愛情で彼女を守り抜く颯斗と共に、今回こそ彩音は失ったすべての尊厳を取り戻すことを心に誓うのだった。

title: Bác Sĩ Thấu Thị
genre: The Chosen One, Zero to Hero, Damsel Rescue, Secret Reveal, Underdog Story, The Chosen One
synopsis_or_hook: Sinh viên y James Madden bỗng có được mắt thấu thị! Anh cứu mạng nữ thừa kế, vượt mặt các bác sĩ danh tiếng và làm giàu từ đồ cổ, chứng khoán. Luôn bảo vệ bạn bè và xả thân cứu mỹ nhân, hãy cùng xem chàng trai tay trắng này vươn lên đỉnh cao và chinh phục thế giới ra sao!

title: Doctorul cu raze X
genre: The Chosen One, Zero to Hero, Damsel Rescue, Secret Reveal, Underdog Story, The Chosen One
synopsis_or_hook: Studentul la medicină James Madden capătă vedere cu raze X! Salvează o moștenitoare, depășește medici de top și face avere din antichități și acțiuni. Mereu gata să-și apere prietenii și să salveze tinere superbe, urmărește ascensiunea acestui erou neașteptat până în vârful lumii!

title: Divorce Trial, Exposing Her Betrayal
synopsis_or_hook: After seven years of marriage, everyone believed Xenia was a devoted wife. But her husband, Frederick, uncovered her secret betrayal. To end it all, he goes to the Bar Association and demands that Xenia — his own wife — handle his divorce case. She has no idea. He feeds her evidence of her own affair, piece by piece, and forces her to win the lawsuit for him. Until the trial begins. And she comes face to face with the husband she never thought she'd lose. Now, it's too late for regret.

title: Veiled Immortal Bonds
synopsis_or_hook: Eryndor never knew he was born with the ultimate power. Even his fiancee Vera wanted to call off their engagement because she thought he was a loser. When his enemies challenged him, he finally learned the truth. He was never ordinary. He was invincible all along.

title: Forced to Marry the CEO I Saved
synopsis_or_hook: Lawrence descends the mountains to find his childhood friend, the "chubby girl." After rescuing Yvette from an assassination attempt, he is forced into a sudden marriage. Posing as a security guard, he protects the Feng family and confronts villains like Mr. K and the Evil God. Discovering that the Evil God is the one who killed his father and burned the orphanage, Lawrence awakens his family’s blade technique to exact revenge, ultimately confirming that Yvette is indeed his long-lost "chubby girl."

title: Mom, I Owe You A Fortune
synopsis_or_hook: Reborn as a tycoon with regret, Frederick returns to his parents' divorce day to side with his wronged mother, vowing to rewrite their destiny with wealth and power.

title: Stolen Legacy
synopsis_or_hook: Ten years ago, Freddie crippled Harrison for a billion-dollar fortune. But Harrison survived—and secretly built a business empire from nothing. Now, Freddie is back. He fakes an illness, tricks the parents, and drugs Harrison to steal his kidney. Big mistake. Harrison isn't the weak lamb they remember. He's a wolf ready to kill.

title: After a Wild Night, Pretty CEO and Child at My Door
synopsis_or_hook: Forced out of the elite Dragon's Claw, Maximilian stumbles upon a drugged CEO, Genevieve. One night changes everything. Five years later, she shows up with their daughter. Now this retired legend must step up as a father and husband—crushing every threat that dares touch his newfound family.

title: Reborn to Revenge My Evil Foster Daughter
synopsis_or_hook: Morgana adored her adopted daughter, even kicking out her own flesh and blood for her. But the adopted daughter was a snake—she stole Morgana's hundred-billion fortune, left her with nothing, and starved her to death. Unwilling to accept her fate, Morgana is reborn. Now she's back to make the viper pay and to give her real daughter everything she owes her.

title: Slay, Madam
synopsis_or_hook: Two girls were kidnapped and rescued by a kind cleaner who raised them. One of them, Marianne, got her rich family back at 15—but she saw her past as shame. To erase the witnesses, she poisoned and tried to run down Stephanie. The cleaner pushed Stephanie aside and died. Then Marianne hit her again. But Stephanie survived. She turned out to be the lost heir of a billion‑dollar empire. Five years later, she's back—not as a victim, but as a predator.

title: Don't Mess With the Real Heiress
synopsis_or_hook:
The only daughter of the tycoon Miles, heir to Rong Group, Mirabel, has finally returned from studying abroad.
Miles's secretary and girlfriend, Regina, eager to gain Mirabel's approval and secure her marriage into the family, brings along a priceless medical reagent—personally gifted to her by Miles — to greet Mirabel at the airport.
But by a twist of fate, Mirabel stops a car and the reagent is shattered. In a fit of rage, Regina, not knowing Mirabel's true identity, does something to her that she will regret for the rest of her life.

title: Modern Emperor Who Speaks English
synopsis_or_hook: Hurt by his cheating girlfriend with a jade seal, he wakes up as an ancient emperor! Using modern knowledge, he gained Empress Cynthia's favor and rose to legendary status!

title: Supreme Master Asks You to Believe in Science
synopsis_or_hook: Christian, now the Supreme Master, lives for one purpose: revenge against the enemy who ruined him ten years ago. Fearing hatred will consume him, his master arranges a marriage to remind him that love still exists. But when Christian arrives to claim his betrothed, her family breaks the vow. Humiliated but undeterred, he is unexpectedly taken in as a son-in-law by the struggling Jiang family. What begins as a convenient arrangement soon becomes the foundation of his rise.

title: Farewell to Old Love
synopsis_or_hook: Gretchen Spencer walks down the aisle in her white gown—all alone. The only guest? Her mother‑in‑law. The groom never shows. She smiles through the humiliation. Two years later, fate throws her face‑to‑face with the missing husband she never really had.

title: Your Majesty, I Am Loyal to You
synopsis_or_hook: Aaronian time-travels to a dynasty and becomes a small‑town magistrate. He accidentally gets caught in a deadly power struggle between an empress and her corrupt ministers. To stay alive, he fights back with modern tricks—crushing conspiracies one by one. Now, he and the empress join forces to save the empire and bring peace.

title: Married in a Flash to the Healing Fairy
synopsis_or_hook: Her father's mistress and her daughter stole Christina's engagement to the Lu family, then sent her away to a remote village. There, she met a mysterious old man—who turned out to be the legendary Wuji Healer. Years later, the crippled fiancé is dying, and the family wants his billion-dollar bride price. So they drag Christina back... to take her sister's place and marry a broken man.

title: Please don't die, Alpha! I Can Heal You Every Night
synopsis_or_hook: Brief Synopsis: Vesper, bent on raising funds to save her father, strikes a deal with Raymond, the Hell's Gang boss, to become his contract lover. Unaware to Vesper, Raymond has been nursing a secret affection for her. How will they navigate the tangled web of money and love's misunderstandings...

title: The Heiress Prevented from Returning Home
synopsis_or_hook: Eleanor gave up her billion-dollar inheritance for love, marrying Jacob, a poor boy from Mississippi. Three years later, pregnant and ready to bring her husband home for Thanksgiving to reveal her true identity, she instead finds herself betrayed by Jacob and his family. Convinced his mistress is the key to his promotion, Jacob abandons Eleanor on the highway, locks her in a trunk, and drags her back South—costing her the baby. On the brink of despair, she’s rescued by her brothers, files for divorce, and rises from the ashes to reclaim her life.

title: My Husband Is An American Hero
synopsis_or_hook: They bullied a hero's pregnant widow on her way to his funeral, hurling insults. At the service, their cruelty escalated, nearly making her lose her child. But their horror began when her father, General Thomas, arrived. The woman they tormented was his daughter. In that moment, their dreams of power shattered, and justice was swiftly delivered.

title: The Christmas Twin Miracle
synopsis_or_hook: After losing her newborn twins on Christmas Day, Beth rebuilds her life—until she meets Ethan, a powerful CEO and single father whose twins claim she’s their mother. A marriage of convenience turns real, but when Ethan’s hidden identity and ex-wife resurface, love is pushed to the breaking point.

title: First Daughter:Forbidden Duty
genre: All
synopsis_or_hook: After her father, the President, is assassinated, Nova becomes a target of dangerous political enemies. When her father’s best friend and former special forces officer Grant Steele is sent to protect her as her personal bodyguard, Nova immediately distrusts him, seeing him as a hypocrite just like her deceased father. When she uncovers his dark BDSM secrets, she decides to use it against him, trying to seduce him to prove her point. But the more she pushes him, the more she finds herself drawn to his strength and vulnerability. As the two grow closer, their bond deepens, and the lines between manipulation and love blur while they fight to survive against the conspirators who will stop at nothing to destroy her.

title: It's A Wonderful Hire
genre: All
synopsis_or_hook: In snowy Aspen just before Christmas, Quinn is betrayed on her wedding day when she catches her fiancé cheating with her stepsister. What's worse is that she comes to learn they are also plotting to steal her mother’s diner, which is her one true legacy. In a move of desperation, she hires gentle “hotel waiter” Wesley to pose as her fake boyfriend in an attempt to secure the diner, unaware he is the hidden heir to a luxury hotel empire. A holiday romance built on lies, healing, and true love begins.

title: Marrying My Ex's Boss
synopsis_or_hook: Orphaned Sylvia gives up her dream of jewelry design to pay for her sick sister’s surgery. Framed for cheating with CEO Leo by her boyfriend Alan and his enemies, Leo is forced into a fake marriage with her to protect his company’s reputation. Yet as they grow close, he discovers her talent and kind heart. When the truth is exposed, Sylvia leaves—but Leo gives up his throne to win her back. Together they defeat the conspirators, and when the contract ends, Leo proposes with true love.

title: Alpha's Tender Torture
synopsis_or_hook:
Calla has been an orphan since childhood and was adopted by the werewolf Rogue "Nico". On a full moon night, she got lost in the forest and accidentally encountered Kael, the Wolf King, during his estrus cycle. He recognized her as his destined mate, leaving behind a token and a promise symbolizing her as the Future Luna.
However, fate played a cruel trick. Nico fell seriously ill, requiring a huge sum for surgery. Left with no other options, Calla had to turn to Kael for help. Yet, because Nico's family was once exiled for betraying the Blood Moon Pack, Calla dared not reveal the true reason for needing the money.
Kael, misunderstanding her intentions, thought she was a gold-digger. To humiliate her, he forced her to sign a three-year kept woman contract. Throughout those three years, love and misunderstanding entangled them in a painful struggle.
As the contract nears its end, Calla learns that Kael is set to marry the daughter of another Wolf King for an alliance. Choosing to leave, she unexpectedly discovers she is pregnant. Torn between her choices, where will she go? And when will Kael finally learn the truth behind Calla's sacrifices...

title: Second Chance, Double Trouble
synopsis_or_hook: Lorraine discovered she was pregnant and was about to share the good news with Andrew — but instead, Andrew brought his first love, Lucy, home with him. Provoked by Lucy's schemes, the two argued and impulsively divorced. Nine months later, Andrew accidentally found Lorraine's pregnancy report and searched the entire city for her. By then, Lorraine had given birth to twins and was forced to give their firstborn, Chris, to Andrew, then faked her own death to escape. Eight years later, Lorraine returned to the country with her second child, Alex, for work, and reunited with Andrew. With the twins' help, the two gradually noticed the changes in each other — and their prejudice toward one another began to shift…

title: Double Contract Love
synopsis_or_hook:
After a passion wild night, Renee married a unknown man for revenging her mom on her stepmother and stepsister, and surprisingly found her new husband just the man she shared one night love with!
They both have a great interest in each other, but meanwhile they both hide something from each other. Would their one night love come into true love? And how would Renee carry out her revenge?

title: Debt of Desire and Love with a Billionaire
synopsis_or_hook:
Caitlin pretended to cheat on her boyfriend Francis and broke up with him in order to raise money for her mother's medical treatment. After inheriting a massive fortune, Francis ran into Caitlin again — but due to misunderstandings, he constantly humiliated her. Caitlin hid the truth about her pregnancy. Facing a forced family marriage, a career crisis, and her mother's interference, the two went through countless hardships yet still couldn't let go of each other.
In the end, Francis gave up everything to overcome all obstacles for love. At the critical moment, he saved Caitlin — though he was severely injured and fell into a coma. Caitlin stayed by his side the entire time. After enduring all their trials, the two reunited and welcomed a happy future together.

title: Return of the Racing King
synopsis_or_hook: The racing king, Alexander, was framed by his adopted brother Cade during the championship and ended up at the Apollo Club, working as a mechanic. But the Apollo Club was threatened by Cade’s underlings. Alexander had no choice but to return to the racing world — the king of racing is back...

title: The Scent That Made Him Mine
synopsis_or_hook: Their love was sealed with a kiss in the perfumery, but a family conspiracy turned it into a curse. She “betrayed” him to settle debts; he “died” in a crash. Five years later, she’s a down-and-out job seeker, while he’s the dashing heir of a conglomerate. When a perfume bottle shatters, the familiar scent unravels secrets — the locked room, the staged betrayal. Who’s pulling the strings? Click to witness the electrifying showdown between love and revenge!

title: From XL to Extra Love
synopsis_or_hook: Kate Harris, once an overlooked, plus-size dreamer, lands a job at Reynolds Group and meets the CEO of her fantasies—the effortlessly charming Lucas Reynolds. But her fairytale crashes when she’s framed for plagiarism by the jealous office queen Chloe, and Lucas, deceived by appearances, fires her on the spot. Crushed but not defeated, Kate takes a dangerous weight-loss drug and reemerges with a new identity and a stunning transformation. Back at Reynolds Group as a rising star designer, she begins to dismantle Chloe’s web of lies, all while catching Lucas’s attention once more. What Lucas doesn’t know is that the captivating woman he’s falling for is the same girl who once gave him hope during his darkest childhood days — the sweet, chubby Kate. As secrets unravel and the misunderstandings fade, Kate and Lucas inch closer to a second chance at love. But just when it seems like their story might get its fairy-tale ending… the drug fails, the weight returns...

title: The Extraordinary Mother of a Billionaire
genre: Drama, Revenge, Modern, Feel-Good, Violent, Slice of Life
synopsis_or_hook: Roger, chairman of the trillion-dollar group WestDream, wantsto do something special for his single mother and introduce his fiancée Vivian to her, so he brings his mother Susan, who works at a small-town restaurant, to the city to celebrate her birthday. However, Vivian’s cousin Lisa, unaware of Susan’s true identity, mistakes Susan for a thief and humiliates her. Later, Susan is again targeted by her future daughter-in-law Vivian, who treats Susan as a fraud and humiliates her. Susan tries again and again to defend herself, but no one listens.After suffering repeated humiliation, she is finally rescued by Roger. Only then does everyone realize that the humble Susan really is Roger’s mother. But by then, it is too late for regret. Roger resolves to punish the villains who bullied his mother and help her regain her dignity.

title: Era de chicas mecha: la belleza fría pide mejoras de noche
synopsis_or_hook: En un mundo dominado por las chicas mecha, Caesar Leat no era nada: simple escoria de rango F a quien todos ignoraban. Hasta que despertó el Sistema de Mejora. Una chica mecha moribunda fue su primera obra maestra: de rango SSS, nacida de la chatarra y pura determinación. Ahora asciende, una mejora a la vez. Pero el poder no pasa desapercibido. Mechanicus, la élite oculta que mueve los hilos, se cree intocable. Aún no conocen al chico capaz de convertir la basura en leyendas. ¿Y sus chicas mecha? Ellas quemarían el mundo por él.

title: Sânge trădat, magnatul se întoarce
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Raymond și soția sa sacrifică totul pentru a-i plăti studiile fratelui său, Bradley. 10 ani mai târziu, nerecunoscătorul Bradley îl aduce pe Logan Crawford să le demoleze casa și chiar își forțează cumnata într-o situație compromițătoare. Când totul pare pierdut, Raymond revine ca președinte al Pinnacle Group. Îl va face pe Bradley să plătească pentru trădarea sa.

title: Betrayed Blood, Tycoon Returns
genre: Family Drama, Zero to Hero, Reunion Years Later, Identity Reveal, Emotional Abuse, Hidden Identity
synopsis_or_hook: Raymond and his wife sacrifice everything to put his brother Bradley through school. Ten years later, the ungrateful Bradley brings Logan Crawford to bulldoze their home and even forces his sister-in-law into a compromising position. When all seems lost, Raymond returns as chairman of Pinnacle Group. He's going to make Bradley pay for his betrayal.

title: Diburu Bos Mafia Karena Aroma Anggurku
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Lily cuti kuliah dan bekerja sebagai penginjak anggur untuk membayar biaya pendidikannya. Di hari ulang tahun sang pacar, Eric, ia mengikuti saran sahabatnya untuk mengikat diri di ayunan sebagai kado. Namun, yang pulang malam itu bukanlah Eric, melainkan ayahnya, Victor—bos mafia kejam yang berdarah dingin. Keduanya tak sengaja menghabiskan malam yang tak terlupakan. Saat Victor terbangun dan menyadari kebenarannya, ia memerintahkan anak buahnya memburu wanita misterius beraroma anggur tersebut...

title: Mafia's Little Grape
genre: Mafia, Upgrade from Ex, Caught Cheating, Damsel Rescue, One Night Stand, Serendipity
synopsis_or_hook: Default

title: Tunduklah pada Putri Miliardarku!
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Pada hari Rose melahirkan, ia memergoki suaminya, Tyler, dan anak didiknya, Sarah, berselingkuh—serta baru saja menukar putri kandungnya dengan putra haram mereka, membiarkan bayinya mati di tengah hujan. Rose diam-diam menyelamatkan putrinya dan menghabiskan dua dekade membesarkannya menjadi pewaris miliarder, sambil berpura-pura menjadi ibu yang penuh kasih bagi sang anak palsu. Ketika pembalasan dendamnya tiba, tak ada satu pun yang akan selamat.

title: Divorce Me？Bow to My Billionaire Daughter!
genre: Billionaire, Revenge, Caught Cheating, Identity Reveal, Parent Identity Reveal, Secret Reveal
synopsis_or_hook: The day Rose gives birth, she discovers her husband Tyler and protégée Sarah have been having an affair—and have just swapped her newborn daughter for their illegitimate son, leaving her real baby to die in the rain. Rose rescues her daughter in secret and spends the next two decades raising her into a billionaire heiress, while quietly playing the doting “mother” to the impostor child. When her revenge finally lands, no one will be left standing.

title: Too Late, Clair Collins
genre: Billionaire, Regret, One Night Stand, Misunderstanding, Secret Reveal, Hidden Feelings
synopsis_or_hook:
Years ago, Jake Hudson entered the Los Angeles business school on a Collins family scholarship. During a fraternity incident, he was rescued by Clair, the eldest daughter of the Collins family, and developed feelings for her. However, a drugging plot led Jake to mistakenly enter Clair's room. To protect the family's reputation, the elder Collins arranged a contract marriage between the two, while secretly entrusting Jake with investigating a traitor within the corporation.

During the marriage, Clair misunderstood Jake's scheming nature, becoming cold and distant towards him, even allowing others to humiliate him. Jake, however, remained patient, concealing his feelings, protecting Clair while silently contributing to the corporation.

Three years later, Jake, believing he had repaid her debt of gratitude, decided to leave. Only then did Clair realize that Jake was not only not the mastermind behind the poisoning incident but had also made significant contributions to the corporation. Feeling deeply guilty, she began to pursue him. She gradually discovered Jake's resilience and independence, as well as his deep affection for her.

title: Sudah Terlambat, Clair Collins
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Bertahun-tahun lalu, Jake Hudson masuk ke sekolah bisnis di Los Angeles berkat beasiswa dari keluarga Collins. Saat terjadi insiden di kampus, ia diselamatkan oleh Clair, putri sulung keluarga Collins, dan benih cinta pun tumbuh. Namun, jebakan obat bius membuat Jake tak sengaja masuk ke kamar Clair. Demi menjaga nama baik keluarga, tetua Collins mengatur pernikahan kontrak untuk mereka, sambil diam-diam menugaskan Jake menyelidiki pengkhianat di perusahaan. Selama menikah, Clair salah paham dan menganggap Jake licik. Ia bersikap dingin, menjauh, bahkan membiarkan orang lain merendahkannya. Namun, Jake tetap sabar memendam perasaan. Ia terus melindungi Clair sambil diam-diam berkorban untuk perusahaan. Tiga tahun berlalu, Jake merasa utang budinya telah lunas dan memutuskan untuk pergi. Barulah Clair sadar bahwa Jake bukanlah dalang di balik insiden pembiusan itu, melainkan sosok yang berjasa besar bagi perusahaan. Dihantui rasa bersalah, Clair mulai mengejar hatinya kembali. Ia perlahan melihat ketangguhan dan kemandirian Jake, serta cintanya yang begitu dalam.

title: La extraordinaria madre de un multimillonario
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook:
Roger, presidente del grupo multimillonario WestDream, quiere hacer algo especial por su madre soltera y presentarla a su prometida, Vivian. Por ello, trae a su madre, Susan, quien trabaja en un restaurante de un pueblo pequeño, a la ciudad para celebrar su cumpleaños.

Sin embargo, Lisa, la prima de Vivian, al desconocer la verdadera identidad de Susan, la confunde con una ladrona y la humilla. Más tarde, Susan es nuevamente blanco de ataques por parte de su futura nuera, Vivian, quien la trata de farsante y la humilla. Susan intenta una y otra vez defenderse, pero nadie la escucha. Tras sufrir repetidas humillaciones, finalmente es rescatada por Roger.

Solo entonces todos se dan cuenta de que la humilde Susan realmente es la madre de Roger. Pero para entonces, es demasiado tarde para arrepentirse. Roger decide castigar a los villanos que acosaron a su madre y ayudarla a recuperar su dignidad.

title: A Extraordinária Mãe do Bilionário
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook:
Roger, presidente do grupo WestDream, avaliado em trilhões de dólares, quer fazer algo especial para sua mãe solteira e apresentar sua noiva, Vivian, a ela. Para isso, ele leva sua mãe, Susan, que trabalha em um restaurante de uma cidade pequena, para a cidade grande para comemorar seu aniversário.

No entanto, a prima de Vivian, Lisa, não conhecendo a verdadeira identidade de Susan, confunde ela com uma ladra e a humilha. Mais tarde, Susan é novamente alvo de sua futura nora, Vivian, que a trata como uma impostora e a humilha. Susan tenta se defender repetidamente, mas ninguém a ouve. Após sofrer humilhações constantes, ela finalmente é resgatada por Roger.

Só então todos percebem que a humilde Susan é, na verdade, a mãe de Roger. Mas, a essa altura, já é tarde demais para arrependimentos. Roger decide punir os vilões que maltrataram sua mãe e ajudá-la a recuperar sua dignidade.

title: A Pegadinha Que Nos Destruiu
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: A brilhante aluna Eleanor Vance foi a melhor amiga de Leo Carter por 16 anos, até ele fazê-la desmaiar e amarrá-la a uma trave como uma pegadinha para impressionar a popular Savannah. Humilhada na frente de toda a escola, Eleanor se muda para a Califórnia sem dizer nada. Lá, ela encontra amigos de verdade, sucesso nos estudos e um novo namorado carinhoso. Enquanto isso, Leo enlouquece de arrependimento, mas Eleanor aprendeu que certas traições não têm perdão.

title: La broma que nos rompió
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Eleanor Vance, estudiante estrella, fue la mejor amiga de Leo Carter por 16 años, hasta que él la dejó inconsciente y la ató a un poste como una broma para impresionar a Savannah, la chica popular. Humillada ante toda la escuela, Eleanor se muda a California sin decir nada. Allí encuentra amigos de verdad, éxito académico y un novio cariñoso. Mientras Leo enloquece de arrepentimiento, Eleanor ha aprendido que algunas traiciones jamás se perdonan.

title: She Hears the Dead
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: In Laswell City, a series of bizarre homicides have emerged, with every victim'sskeletalremainsdeliberatelybroken.ForensicanthropologistEvelynteamsupwith Detective Jack to investigate, only to discover that all the deceased are linked to the St. Anna Sanatorium fire twenty years ago—a blaze officially ruled an "accident" that claimed the lives of her parents. As Evelyn delves deeper into the bones, she uncovers the truth: the sanatorium had been conducting illegal human experiments under the guise of medical treatment, and the director, Marcus, set the fire to cover up his crimes. Her parents were not killed in the fire, but were murdered by Marcus himself for discovering his secret. Just as Evelyn and Jack inch closer to the truth, the mastermind behind it all finally reveals herself—Lilith, the sole intact witness of the fire, and the ultimate orchestrator of this twenty-year-delayed revenge.

title: Tulang-Tulang yang Membalas Dendam
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Di Kota Laswell, terjadi rentetan pembunuhan aneh di mana tulang korbannya sengaja dipatahkan. Antropolog forensik Evelyn dan Detektif Jack menyelidikinya, lalu menemukan bahwa semua korban terkait kebakaran Sanatorium St. Anna 20 tahun silam—peristiwa yang diklaim sebagai kecelakaan dan merenggut nyawa orang tua Evelyn. Lewat sisa tulang yang ada, Evelyn menguak fakta mengejutkan: sanatorium itu melakukan eksperimen manusia ilegal berkedok pengobatan. Sang direktur, Marcus, sengaja memicu kebakaran untuk menutupi kejahatannya. Orang tua Evelyn dibunuh oleh Marcus karena mengetahui rahasia itu, bukan tewas akibat api. Saat penyelidikan Evelyn dan Jack makin menemui titik terang, dalang utamanya menampakkan diri. Dia adalah Lilith, satu-satunya saksi selamat dari kebakaran itu sekaligus perancang balas dendam yang tertunda 20 tahun ini.

title: สะดุดรักสัญญาเลิฟ
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: เวินฉิงพลาดมีสัมพันธ์กับลี่หานสือ เขาช่วยเธอจากพ่อใจทรามจนเกิดเป็นสัญญาแต่งงาน หลังรู้ว่าเธออุ้มท้องไปทำงาน ท่านประธานก็คลั่งรักและออกโรงปกป้องเธอจากทุกคน ท้ายสุดเมื่อรู้ชาติกำเนิดจริง ทั้งคู่จึงฉีกสัญญาทิ้งแล้วจัดงานแต่งจริงขึ้นมา

title: Paman Tunanganku Merebutku
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Vivian, pewaris yang bangkrut, memergoki tunangan dan sahabatnya bersekongkol mencabut ventilator ayahnya di pesta pertunangan mereka. Saat kabur, ia jatuh ke pelukan paman tunangannya, Alistair, si Tiran Wall Street. Pria itu menjanjikan keselamatan ayahnya dengan imbalan kontrak pernikahan. Vivian melawan: ia membuat tunangannya mabuk hingga reputasinya hancur, dan menjebloskan sahabatnya ke penjara. Namun, karena mengira Alistair yang membunuh ibunya, ia bekerja sama dengan investor asing untuk menghancurkan perusahaannya lewat short sell. Kebenaran pun terungkap bahwa Alistair adalah bocah yang menyelamatkannya dari kebakaran sepuluh tahun lalu, dengan luka bakar di punggungnya yang tak pernah sembuh. Keduanya pun bersatu. Vivian secara terbuka mengambil alih kerajaan bisnis, sementara Alistair diam-diam mengerahkan dana rahasia untuk menyerang balik. Tunangan brengseknya bangkrut, sahabatnya gila, dan sang dalang utama dibiarkan sekarat tanpa perawatan medis. Di puncak kemenangan mereka, Alistair berlutut dan memakaikan kalung di pergelangan kaki Vivian: Aku rela menjadi tawananmu. Vivian mengangkat dagu pria itu sembari tersenyum: Selama ini kita telah saling menjadi tawanan.

title: He Claimed Me at My Engagement Party
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Vivian, the bankrupt heiress, walks in on her fiancé and her best friend plotting to pull her father's ventilator plug at their engagement party. While fleeing, she falls into the arms of her fiancé's uncle—Alistair, the "Tyrant of Wall Street." He offers to save her father in exchange for a binding marriage contract. Vivian fights back: she gets her fiancé drunk and ruins his reputation, and sends her best friend to prison. But she mistakenly believes Alistair is the one who killed her mother, and teams up with foreign investors to short his conglomerate. When the truth comes to light—he is the boy who saved her from a fire ten years ago, his back bearing burns that never healed—the two powerhouses join forces. She takes control of the financial empire in the open, while he secretly deploys phantom funds to counterattack. The scumbag fiancé goes bankrupt, the best friend descends into madness, and the mastermind behind it all is left without access to medical care. At the pinnacle of their victory, he kneels and fastens a necklace around her ankle: "I am willing to be your prisoner." She lifts his chin with a smile: "We have been each other's captives all along."

title: Captive In Mafia King’s Embrace情陷黑帮之王
genre: Mafia, Dark Romance, Damsel Rescue, BDSM, Intense Sexual Tension, Misunderstanding
synopsis_or_hook: Default

title: Tawanan dalam Pelukan Raja Mafia
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Terdorong keputusasaan mencari biaya operasi ibunya, Elena, seorang lulusan baru, tanpa sengaja masuk ke wilayah terlarang dan bertemu Dante Moretti, Raja Mafia New York yang kejam. Dante memberinya ultimatum mematikan namun menggoda: menjadi simpanan ke-11 dengan bayaran satu juta dolar, atau biarkan ibunya mati. Terjebak dalam dunia perebutan kekuasaan dan hasrat gelap, pertahanan Elena pun runtuh. Menjelang akhir kontrak tujuh hari mereka, ia melihat sisi lain dari pria yang dulu ditakutinya itu—pria yang rela bertaruh nyawa untuk menyelamatkannya. Kini, Elena harus memilih: mengambil kembali kebebasannya, atau tetap di sisi Dante dalam kisah cinta yang berbahaya sekaligus memikat.

title: My Master My Slave
genre: LGBTQ, Gay, LGBTQ+, Second Chance, Reunion Years Later, Misunderstanding
synopsis_or_hook:
Five years ago, Morris was the young master who vanished; Ivan the manservant left behind. Now, Ivan is a billionaire CEO, while Morris is so desperate he trades his nude photos to his former servant for his sister’s medical fees. This deal deepens the thorn of abandonment in Ivan’s heart. He humiliates Morris with money, yet can’t help falling for him, mistaking revenge for a game he’s already lost.

After an accident, Morris fakes amnesia to prolong their twisted entanglement. Ivan, seizing the chance, crafts a bigger lie: he tells the “amnesiac” Morris they are engaged lovers. Thus begins an engagement full of hidden agendas—one pretends to forget, the other pretends to possess. But on their wedding day, Ivan’s stepmother Irene exposes both deceptions. As the lies unravel, the truth of that rainy abandonment, the desperation behind the photos, and the love buried under revenge are laid bare. Two liars, one overdue “I love you.”

title: Majikanku, Budakku
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Lima tahun lalu, Morris adalah tuan muda yang menghilang, meninggalkan pelayannya, Ivan. Kini, Ivan menjadi CEO miliarder, sementara Morris begitu putus asa hingga rela menukar foto telanjangnya kepada sang mantan pelayan demi biaya pengobatan adiknya. Kesepakatan ini mengorek kembali luka lama Ivan yang merasa dicampakkan. Ia merendahkan Morris dengan uang, namun diam-diam tetap jatuh cinta padanya—menganggap balas dendam ini sebagai permainan yang nyatanya sudah ia kalahkan sejak awal. Setelah kecelakaan, Morris berpura-pura amnesia untuk mengulur hubungan rumit mereka. Ivan memanfaatkan kesempatan ini untuk mengarang kebohongan yang lebih besar: ia meyakinkan Morris yang amnesia bahwa mereka sudah bertunangan. Dimulailah hubungan penuh niat terselubung—satu orang berpura-pura lupa, yang lain berpura-pura memiliki. Namun di hari pernikahan, ibu tiri Ivan, Irene, membongkar semua kepalsuan itu. Saat kebohongan tersingkap, terkuaklah kebenaran di balik kepergian di hari hujan itu, keputusasaan dari foto-foto tersebut, serta cinta yang terpendam di balik dendam. Dua pendusta, dan satu pernyataan cinta yang tertunda.

title: Dia Punya Tiga Kekasih
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook:
Lili Julia, si ratu penakluk hati, kabur setelah menamatkan game sambil membawa hadiah ratusan miliar. Tiga tahun kemudian, dia dipaksa kembali oleh tiga dewa NPC yang pernah ia tinggalkan. Pangeran serigala yang dulu manja kini menjadi penguasa brutal yang ingin mengurungnya, leluhur vampir yang elegan berubah menjadi seniman obsesif yang ingin menjadikannya boneka abadi, dan pendeta suci yang dingin rela jatuh ke dalam kegelapan demi dirinya. 
Di tengah cinta, obsesi, dan perebutan, Lili memutuskan melawan untuk membuat para dewa itu kembali bertekuk lutut padanya.

title: Został rzucony. Zyskał LadyAid.
genre: Harem, Damsel Rescue, Intense Sexual Tension, Sabotaging, Competition, Comeback
synopsis_or_hook: Gavin to spłukany kurier, którego dziewczyna rzuciła dla bogacza. Upokorzony facet aktywuje system zwrotów LadyAid: pomagaj kobietom, zgarniaj wielką kasę! Drobna przysługa przynosi mu aż 78 000 dolarów. Wkrótce Gavin ratuje kolejne kobiety przed długami i katastrofami, pnąc się od zera na sam szczyt. Jego była próbuje go zniszczyć kłamstwami i intrygami, ale wszystkie uratowane kobiety stają za nim murem.

title: Hamil demi Warisan, Terjebak Cinta Taipan
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Ivy, putri sulung Keluarga Mintz, harus hamil untuk mewarisi perusahaan kakeknya dan menyingkirkan ibu tirinya. Ia memanfaatkan Wyatt, pemuda yang kelihatannya miskin. Setelah semalam bersama, Wyatt sadar Ivy sulit hamil karena kutukan, lalu memberinya obat langka. Wyatt juga dengan mudah membalas sabotase mantan brengsek dan saudari tirinya di kantor. Saat identitas asli Wyatt terungkap, Ivy baru sadar pertemuan mereka ternyata sudah direncanakan.

title: Bound by Deception
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Ivy, the eldest daughter of the Mintz family, must get pregnant to inherit her grandfather's company and thwart her stepmother. She uses Wyatt, a seemingly broke younger man. After one night, he instantly sees she's suffering from a curse preventing pregnancy and provides rare cures. He also effortlessly crushes her scumbag ex and stepsister's workplace sabotage. When Ivy uncovers his true identity, she realizes their encounter was entirely premeditated.

title: They Thought He Was a Eunuch
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Gideon Ashford becomes the top scholar and a third-rank official but is falsely rumored to be a eunuch. Percival Vance, son of the Magistrate of Blackwood, attempts to seize Gideon's wife, Adeline Reed. Patriarch Ned Ashford blames Adeline and subjects her to clan punishment. At the critical moment, Gideon makes a glorious return as the top scholar.

title: Credeau că este eunuc
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Gideon Ashford ajunge erudit suprem și oficial de rangul 3, dar se zvonește fals că ar fi eunuc. Percival Vance, fiul magistratului din Blackwood, vrea să-i fure soția, pe Adeline Reed. Patriarhul Ned Ashford dă vina pe ea și o condamnă la pedeapsa clanului. Exact la timp, Gideon revine glorios ca erudit suprem.

title: The X-Ray Maverick
genre: Zero to Hero, Caught Cheating, Engagement Breakup, Damsel Rescue, Underdog Story, The Chosen One
synopsis_or_hook: Returning from the army, Ethan Ford is betrayed by his fiancée and loses everything. However, a mysterious system grants him X-ray vision and ultimate martial arts. Mastering high-stakes gambling and antique appraisal, Ethan rises to the top. Surrounded by beautiful women, he begins his legendary journey!

title: Jagoan Tembus Pandang
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Pulang dari militer, Ethan Ford dikhianati tunangannya dan kehilangan segalanya. Namun, sebuah sistem misterius memberinya mata tembus pandang dan ilmu bela diri sakti. Ethan pun bangkit menuju puncak lewat judi kelas atas dan keahlian menilai barang antik. Dikelilingi banyak wanita cantik, kisah legendanya pun dimulai!

title: Payout & Payback
genre: Divorce, Revenge, Caught Cheating, Divorce, Sabotaging, Miscarriage
synopsis_or_hook: Eight months pregnant, Allison Grant lands a $5 million bonus. Joking, she's fired; she gets a vicious slap instead of support. Worse yet: her mother-in-law is drugging her to force a miscarriage, while her husband cheats and plots to steal her fortune. Raging, Allison vows revenge. With her best friend and business partner, she plans a brilliant counterattack, making the traitors pay dearly.

title: Răsplată și răzbunare
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Însărcinată în 8 luni, Allison Grant primește un bonus de 5.000.000 dolari. Se preface concediată, dar în loc de sprijin primește o palmă brutală. Mai rău, soacra o droghează pentru a-i provoca un avort, în timp ce soțul o înșală și plănuiește să-i fure averea. Furioasă, Allison jură să se răzbune. Alături de cea mai bună prietenă și parteneră de afaceri, pune la cale un contraatac genial pentru a-i face pe trădători să plătească scump.

title: Întoarcerea lui Wraith King
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Caleb este fiul renegat al unei case în declin, considerat slab și ignorat de toți. Însă, când sora sa Elara e la un pas de moarte, el dezvăluie un adevăr terifiant: este reîncarnarea lui Wraith King, cea mai puternică ființă din Imperiul Caelian. În timp ce trădătoarea familie Graves și anticii Fiendkin se revoltă pentru a distruge un sigiliu vechi de secole, Caleb trebuie să unească clanurile rivale de Wraithmasteri, să controleze spirite legendare precum Twin Reapers și să atingă legendarul tărâm Abyssal Sovereign...

title: Trezirea dragonului interior
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Trădat de fosta soție, rămas fără nimic și cu o fiică pe moarte din cauza leucemiei, Liam Blackwood a ajuns la pământ. Totuși, când orice speranță părea pierdută, un pandantiv străvechi îi trezește puterea interioară. Renăscut din cenușă ca Moștenitor al Dragonului, el vindecă incurabilul dintr-o atingere și zdrobește oasele dintr-un singur pas. Acum, înarmat cu un har medical divin, o tehnică de luptă inegalabilă și o sete arzătoare de răzbunare, Liam revine în Everett City, nu să ceară milă, ci să-și îngroape dușmanii.

title: De verdad soy el ancestro de la secta demoníaca
genre: Animation, Fantasy, Action, Harem, Fight-the-System, Damsel Rescue
synopsis_or_hook: Ethan Blackwood transmigra a un mundo de fantasía como el infame Ancestro Demonio justo cuando las sectas justas inician su cruzada. Al ser llamado a pelear, descubre que no heredó nada del poder original. ¡Es alguien completamente normal! Ante una muerte inminente, Ethan solo tiene dos cosas para sobrevivir: sus dotes actorales para mantener la reputación del ancestro y, cuando eso no sea suficiente... ¡gracias al cielo el Sistema por fin se activa!

title: Her Kidney, His Regret
genre: Regret, Identity Reveal, Later in Life, Reunion Years Later, Illness, Misunderstanding
synopsis_or_hook: Eight years after giving her son a kidney, Helen Miller is broke and has two months to live. She visits him, only to be disowned. Meanwhile, Cole Group's chairman, Andrew Cole, is searching for his long-lost wife...

title: Rinichiul ei, regretul lui
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: La 8 ani după ce i-a donat un rinichi fiului ei, Helen Miller a rămas fără bani și mai are 2 luni de trăit. Îl vizitează, dar el o reneagă. Între timp, Andrew Cole, președintele Cole Group, își caută soția dispărută de mult...

title: Reina de las bestias: un imperio a mis pies
genre: Animation, Fantasy, Sexual-Awakening, Underdog, Mind-Bending, Imaginative
synopsis_or_hook: Valeria Mendoza viaja a un mundo estelar y activa un sistema. Con astucia, supera trampas, descubre energía y toma el poder del imperio. Al despertar su energía espiritual, se convierte en heredera para conquistar las estrellas.

title: 나의 남은 생에 너라는 지옥은 없다
genre: Drama, Mom-and-Son, Absurd, Regrettable, Housewife, CEO
synopsis_or_hook: 천신 그룹의 실권자 소윤서는 남편 구재현을 위해 기꺼이 막후로 물러나 7년간 전업주부로서 가정을 돌봤다. 심지어 구재현이 중병에 걸렸을 때도 곁을 지키며 완치를 도왔으나, 헌신의 대가는 잔혹한 배신이었다. 아들의 백일잔치 당일, 구재현은 내연녀 소세희와 혼외자를 당당히 집으로 데리고 들어온다. 시부모의 묵인 하에 구재현은 소윤서에게 소세희 모자의 입주를 받아들여 가문의 보모로 살든지, 아이를 두고 이혼당하든지 선택하라며 잔인한 요구를 던진다.

title: 訣別～果てなき余生にあなたを捨てて～
genre: Drama, Mom-and-Son, Absurd, Regrettable, Housewife, CEO
synopsis_or_hook: 蘇晩晴は、大企業天宸グループを裏で操る真の権力者。しかし、愛する夫顧衍琛を支えるため、その正体を隠して専業主婦となり、7年もの間、裏方として尽くし続けてきた。夫が重病に倒れた際も、彼女は持てる力の全てを注ぎ込み、彼の命を救ったのだ。しかし、その深すぎる愛情への見返りは、残酷すぎる裏切りだった。愛する息子の生後100日を祝う宴の当日。顧衍琛は堂々と愛人とその隠し子を連れて現れた。さらに、義父母も愛人側を庇い、彼女に非情な二択を突きつける。「愛人母子と同居し、このまま顧家の家政婦として生きるか。それとも、子供を置いて身ひとつで離婚するか」彼らは全く気づいていなかった。今、自分たちがどれほど恐ろしい存在を敵に回したのかを……

title: My Real Family Burned It All Down After I Learned the Truth
genre: Revenge, Drama, Revenge, Revenge, Betrayal, Dark Romance
synopsis_or_hook: After discovering that her husband Matthew and her brother Christopher orchestrated the assault that destroyed her life years ago—breaking her legs, stealing her fertility, and framing her as a disgrace—Scarlett Miller stops being a victim. At her sister Emily’s birthday banquet, she swaps the drugged wine meant to ruin her into Matthew’s hand, setting off a chain of calculated revenge that destroys everyone who betrayed her: her husband, her brother, her adoptive parents, and the fake heiress who stole her place.

title: I Divorced His Whole Family
genre: Strong Heroine, Cheating, Toxic Romance, Romance, Toxic Romance, Revenge
synopsis_or_hook: For three years, Emily is treated like a free watchdog by her toxic husband, Liam, and his parasitic family, who always leave her behind during their lavish vacations. This year, the moment they jet off to the Maldives, Emily quietly sells her pre-marital home and files for divorce. When the family returns to find themselves locked out and homeless, Emily delivers the ultimate blow by exposing Liam's secret affair to his entire social and professional circle. Left with absolutely nothing, the toxic family faces total ruin while Emily embraces her wealthy new life of independence.

title: This Time, I Won't Marry You
genre: Reborn, Revenge, Getting Back at Ex, Secret Reveal, Caught Cheating, Engagement Breakup
synopsis_or_hook: Julian's wife Vicky cheated on him with his friend Harry, and then they murdered him. Now he's reborn, seven days before his wedding. Instead of stopping the wedding, Julian makes sure the cheaters marry each other and he marries another girl, Rachel, Harry's abandoned fiancée. Julian and Rachel make the cheaters drown in debt with a cursed land deal and loans they'll never repay. In the end, justice is served cold.

title: He Didn't Say He Loved Me Until I Left
genre: Drama, Revenge, Hidden Identity, Hidden Identity, Strong Heroine, Revenge
synopsis_or_hook: After five years of devoted love, Harper discovers her boyfriend’s proposal is just a cruel bet among him, his friend and scheming female companion. Heartbroken, she calls off the wedding and leaves Chicago for Austin to start a brand-new career. While her ex sinks into bankruptcy and misfortune due to arrogance and bad choices, Harper climbs up the career ladder through her outstanding professionalism and builds a wonderful life on her own. Regretful and down-and-out, her ex begs for reconciliation repeatedly, yet Harper has long walked out of the past. This is an inspiring story about cutting off toxic love and thriving independently.

title: 婚禮當場換新郎，她傻了
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: 沈墨軒被妻子林婉與好友陳賀合謀背叛，母親被害，自己也慘死刀下。重生回到婚禮前一週，他決定復仇。他聯合同樣被欺騙的陳賀未婚妻江清雪，設下換婚之局——讓林婉嫁給陳賀，自己迎娶江清雪。婚禮當天，新郎新娘當場調換，林婉與陳賀的美夢瞬間破碎。沈墨軒與江清雪聯手撤資、打壓，更利用一塊有問題的城南地塊，引誘陳賀與林婉借高利貸搶拍，最終令兩人傾家蕩產、互相撕咬。這場重生復仇，讓背叛者自食惡果，也讓沈墨軒與江清雪在相互信任中走向新生。

title: Destroy My Silver Wolf Bloodline？I'll Marry a Top Alpha Then
genre: Rebirth, Drama, Revenge, Revenge, Revenge, Fated Mates
synopsis_or_hook:
Destroy My Silver Wolf Bloodline? I Marry the Top Alpha Instead is a thrilling, dark werewolf romance about ultimate revenge and transformation. Natalie, heir to the powerful Warwick silver wolf bloodline, carries the gift to call upon moonlight and protect her pack. She devotes six years to Alpha Liam, only to face brutal betrayal on the eve of their wedding. Zoe, Liam’s deputy, deliberately shaves off her sacred silver hair—the symbol of her legacy—and drugs her to weaken her power. Liam knows everything but chooses to condone, trampling her love and dignity.
In despair, Natalie awakens her long-buried True Mate bond, summoning Nicholas, the most supreme Alpha. Nicholas has waited patiently for years and rises to defend her with overwhelming power. He punishes the betrayers through clan and alliance authority, helping Natalie regain her strength and pride. Finally, she breaks free from the toxic love and marries Nicholas, rising from a humiliated fiancée to the revered Luna of the Lycan Clan. It is a dark epic of blood, loyalty, and true love, celebrating a glorious rebirth from ruin.

title: 흙수저남의 인생 떡상 치트키
genre: Fantasy, Supernatural, The Chosen One, Identity Reveal, Damsel Rescue, Underdog Story
synopsis_or_hook: 왕지한은 맞선에서 거절당한 후 일진녀 길들이기 시스템을 활성화한다. 그리고 일진녀들을 감탄하게 만들어 감탄 수치가 올라갈 때마다, 시스템이 브론즈부터 다이아몬드까지 등급별 보물 상자를 지급한다. 그 상자에서 막대한 현금과 각종 아이템이 쏟아져 나오며, 왕지한은 경제적 자유를 달성하고 진정한 승리자가 된다.

title: Love On Ice
genre: Romance, Sweet Romance, Modern, Romantic, Inspiring, Contemporary
synopsis_or_hook: On the night of her engagement, Charlotte discovers her fiancé William cheating with her best friend. Just as her world collapses, rising hockey star Ryan unexpectedly steps into her life and becomes the only person willing to protect her.But their connection soon pulls them into something far more dangerous than heartbreak. After Ryan is brutally injured during a suspicious game, Charlotte uncovers a web of power, money, and manipulation tied to her family fortune.

title: Mafia's Love Left Me No Way Out
synopsis_or_hook: Rosalia and Nick, the son of a mafia boss, were once a loving engaged couple — but a misunderstanding turned them into each other's killers' enemies. Torn between love and hatred, Nick decided to train Rosalia into the most lethal assassin in the mafia as atonement. After seven years of training, Rosalia began carrying out missions with outstanding results. One day, Nick gave her a new assignment: get close to Dominic, the son of a rival mafia family, and become his girlfriend to earn his trust. A tangled web of love, hate, and vengeance between the three unfolded from there…

title: Hit the Jackpot! My Broke Chef Husband Is a Billionaire?!
synopsis_or_hook: Bankrupt chef Frank arrives to fulfill a marriage contract, but Anna is forced by her greedy stepfather to marry in place of her sick mother. Humiliated and misunderstood as a gold-digger by her fiancé, Anna has no idea that the man in the chef’s uniform is actually a billionaire who owns a global restaurant empire. As he watches the stand-in marriage unfold, a game of identity, betrayal, and true feelings begins—hiding two generations of business conspiracies.

title: My Father's Billionaire Boss Treasured Me as His Bride
synopsis_or_hook: Julia, a bartender, was drugged by Pete — her father's direct superior — who had taken a liking to her. She begged her father for help, but he turned a blind eye. In her struggle to escape, she accidentally crashed into Eric, the group's CEO, and they ended up spending the night together by chance. A month later, Julia discovered she was pregnant. After being beaten by her mother, she ran right into Eric, who had come looking for her. He rescued her. Her friend George suspected she had deliberately set a trap to seduce Eric, but Eric didn't believe it — until he overheard a phone call between Julia and her father, leading him to misunderstand her as a gold digger who had seduced him for money. He gave her money and told her to leave. At the same time Julia was drugged by her parents and handed over to Pete as a "gift" once again, Eric learned that Julia was actually pregnant — and rushed to find her…

title: Love after Layoffs
synopsis_or_hook: The female lead, the backbone of her husband's company, happily returns home after closing a million-dollar deal with a client — only to discover her husband having an affair with his mistress, right there in their own home. Devastated and furious, she goes to a bar to drown her sorrows and decides to divorce him. There, she unexpectedly runs into the client manager she'd just negotiated with that day, and they end up spending the night together. The next morning, she panics, rejects his confession, and flees. What she doesn't know is that the client manager is actually the hidden heir to the entire conglomerate — and he fell for her at first sight the moment he saw her during the negotiation.

title: Memory Reset: Mr. Restraint Begged for Love
synopsis_or_hook: The female lead woke up one day to find she'd lost three years of memory — and discovered she was married to the guy she'd had a crush on since school, the man of her dreams! But at 22, she had never even held a man's hand — and now she had a husband who was also her secret crush! Too bad her dream husband had a childhood sweetheart, who kept setting her up. With partial amnesia, all the female lead wanted was a divorce — to escape this toxic mess. But the male lead refused. When he noticed she no longer fawned over him the way she used to, he found himself falling for her. After seeing the second female lead's true colors, he began defending his wife at every turn and putting her in her place. In the end, the female lead cleared up her misunderstanding of the male lead — and they got their happy ending.

title: My Vampire Bodyguard
synopsis_or_hook: Vampire King Kyle was betrayed by his fiancée and his own brother, and ended up stranded in the human world — where he was saved by Alaina, a fallen heiress. To hide his identity, Kyle became Alaina's bodyguard. On the surface, he protected her safety; behind the scenes, he helped her rise step by step and reclaim her family's fortune. Kyle was deeply drawn to Alaina's blood. By her side, he constantly had to suppress his craving for it — and he began to suspect that Alaina might be his fated mate…

title: Nu mă obliga să intervin
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Chance a dus o viață liniștită, evitând problemele și protejându-și familia. Dar când fiica lui ajunge în pericol, el nu mai poate rămâne ascuns în umbră. Odinioară respectat, acum uitat, el revine în acțiune, nu pentru faimă, ci din iubire. Vechii prieteni îi răspund la chemare, gloriile trecutului renasc tăcut, iar cu pricepere și curaj, el își apără apropiații, păstrând o pace fragilă într-o lume haotică.

title: Juara Memilih Mantan, Miliarder Memilihku
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Serena memberi Chris sang juara tinju waktu tiga tahun dan 99 kesempatan — satu mutiara untuk tiap patah hati. Saat Chris merayakan kemenangannya dengan memilih sang mantan, mutiara ke-99 pun jatuh. Lelah memaafkan, Serena meneken surat cerai dan pergi. Namun, saat ia menata kembali hidupnya, William York — miliarder yang diam-diam mencintainya bertahun-tahun — muncul. Kali ini, akhirnya ada yang benar-benar sadar betapa berharganya dirinya.

title: Betrayed by the Champ, Loved by the Billionaire
genre: Divorce, Marriage of Convenience, Caught Cheating, Divorce, Sabotaging, Secret Reveal
synopsis_or_hook: Default

title: Masked Socialite: My Cellmate Is a Top Tycoon Heir
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook:
Fresh out of prison, Amelia uses the family details she learned from Isabella—the real Walker heir—while incarcerated to craft an elaborate disguise. She's welcomed back to the opulent Walker estateastheirlong-lostdaughter.Navigatingaminefieldof hypocritical relatives and scheming suitors, her mission is crystal clear: seize the family fortune and destroy the scumbag who framed her. Just as she's about to get engaged to her wealthy fiancé at a lavish gala, the real Isabella appears—as a guest. Also recently released from prison, Isabella knows every single one of Amelia's secrets. Stunned but
quick-thinking, Isabella proposes a deal: she'll help Amelia maintain her fake heiress status and get revenge, while Amelia helps Isabella reclaim her mother's inheritance and Walker Group shares stolen by her stepmother. Oneoperatesinthelight,theotherfromtheshadows—perfectly synchronized. Amelia uses her position as "Walker family heiress" to gatherdamningevidence,whileIsabellamastermindseverythingfrom behind the scenes. Together, they repeatedly humiliate the stepmother and sister who try to expose Amelia, and completely destroy the scumbag's reputation.When the battle for Walker family inheritance reaches its climax, the stepmother hires someone to eliminate Amelia in a staged "accident." Isabella gets injured saving her. In that life-or-death moment, their true feelings surface, and they decide to drop all pretenses. At the explosive Walker Group shareholder meeting, Isabella reveals the DNA report and share transfer documents, while Amelia publicly exposes ironclad evidence of the stepmother's crimes—murdering the original wife and embezzling assets. The true heiress returns triumphant; the fake heiress bows out gracefully. Isabella reclaims everything that's hers and gifts Amelia enough money to start a completely new life. Two women who once found themselves in the deepest mire have found redemption in each other and now walk toward their own bright futures.

title: Sosialita Bertopeng: Teman Selku Pewaris Konglomerat
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Baru bebas dari penjara, Amelia menggunakan rahasia yang ia pelajari dari Isabella—pewaris asli keluarga Walker—selama di sel untuk merancang penyamaran sempurna. Ia disambut kembali di kediaman mewah Walker sebagai putri yang hilang. Menghadapi kerabat munafik dan pelamar licik, misinya jelas: merebut harta keluarga dan menghancurkan bajingan yang menjebaknya. Namun, saat ia akan bertunangan di sebuah pesta mewah, Isabella yang asli muncul sebagai tamu! Isabella, yang juga baru bebas, tahu semua rahasia Amelia. Alih-alih membongkarnya, Isabella mengajukan kesepakatan: ia akan membantu Amelia menjaga status palsunya untuk balas dendam, dan Amelia harus membantunya merebut kembali warisan sang ibu serta saham Grup Walker yang dicuri ibu tirinya. Satu beraksi di tempat terang, yang lain di balik bayangan—selaras dengan sempurna. Amelia menggunakan posisinya sebagai pewaris untuk mengumpulkan bukti, sementara Isabella menjadi dalang di balik layar. Bersama-sama, mereka mempermalukan ibu tiri dan sang saudari, serta menghancurkan reputasi si bajingan. Saat perebutan warisan memuncak, sang ibu tiri merancang 'kecelakaan' untuk menyingkirkan Amelia, tetapi Isabella terluka demi menyelamatkannya. Di ambang maut, mereka memutuskan untuk mengakhiri semua sandiwara. Pada rapat pemegang saham Grup Walker yang panas, Isabella mengungkap tes DNA dan dokumen saham, sementara Amelia membeberkan bukti kuat kejahatan sang ibu tiri—pembunuhan istri pertama dan penggelapan aset. Sang pewaris asli menang; sang pewaris palsu mundur dengan anggun. Isabella merebut kembali miliknya dan memberi Amelia uang untuk memulai hidup baru. Dua wanita yang pernah terpuruk kini saling menyelamatkan dan melangkah menuju masa depan yang cerah.

title: Misi Terakhir: Melindungi Sang CEO
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Diusir keluarganya yang berkuasa karena menolak dijodohkan, Dane Kensington—bersandi Nightingale—adalah mantan Operator Elit yang kini terpuruk. Ia lalu mendapat misi baru: menyamar sebagai pengawal Valerie Montgomery, CEO Grup Montgomery. Valerie bukan klien biasa. Ia memegang kunci proyek keamanan global bernama Stardust, dan sindikat kejam menghalalkan segala cara untuk merampasnya. Dane menerima tugas itu, menyembunyikan identitas aslinya sambil menghindari pembunuh bayaran, pengkhianat perusahaan, dan kecurigaan tajam Valerie. Namun, ia tak pernah menyangka akan jatuh cinta pada wanita yang bersumpah ia lindungi...

title: The Apex Operator's Secret Vow
genre: Animation, Charming, Possessive, Regrettable, Assassination, Workplace
synopsis_or_hook: Disowned by his powerful family for refusing an arranged marriage, Dane Kensington—code name Nightingale—is a retired Apex Operator at rock bottom. Then he receives a new mission: go undercover as the bodyguard of Valerie Montgomery, CEO of Montgomery Group. But Valerie is no ordinary client. She holds the key to the global security project known as Stardust—and a ruthless syndicate will stop at nothing to steal it. Dane takes the job, hiding his true identity while dodging assassins, corporate traitors, and Valerie's razor-sharp suspicions. What he never expects is to fall for the woman he's sworn to protect...

title: 我的保镖老公是隐王
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: 預設

title: The True Heiress Strikes Back
genre: Billionaire, Marriage of Convenience, Caught Cheating, Engagement Breakup, Identity Reveal, Getting Back at Ex
synopsis_or_hook: Isabella Klyne, the true heiress, escapes both her real parents and a forced marriage to playboy Derek by flash-marrying Fred Hayward, head of the premier family. Expecting only business, she finds deep love and strength instead. Armed with power, she reveals her secret identity as the founder of a top design group and sets out to crush the Klyne Group and the family that cast her out.

title: Adevărata moștenitoare contraatacă
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Isabella Klyne, adevărata moștenitoare, scapă de părinți și de un mariaj forțat cu playboy-ul Derek, căsătorindu-se rapid cu Fred Hayward, capul celei mai puternice familii. Deși credea că va fi doar o afacere, descoperă dragostea adevărată și își regăsește forța. Înarmată cu o nouă influență, își dezvăluie identitatea secretă de fondatoare a unui imperiu de design și se pregătește să distrugă Grupul Klyne și familia care a respins-o.

title: A Mother's Dark Vow
genre: Family Drama, Regret, Misunderstanding, Secret Reveal, Emotional Abuse, Karma
synopsis_or_hook: Mary Foster and her daughter are critically injured in a crash. When her doctor husband Justin Hayes arrives, he ignores them to save his first love Natalie Collins and her son...

title: Jurământul întunecat al mamei
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Mary Foster și fiica ei sunt grav rănite într-un accident. Când medicul Justin Hayes, soțul ei, ajunge la fața locului, le ignoră pentru a-și salva prima iubire, pe Natalie Collins, și pe fiul ei...

title: Bí Mật Dưới Biển Lặng
genre: Billionaire, Single Dad, Teacher, Hidden Identity, Secret, Fated Lovers
synopsis_or_hook: Zorii, một cô giáo khao khát tự do, đem lòng yêu Nolan, một ông bố đơn thân mang quá khứ tăm tối. Anh nhận ra sự nổi loạn đầy cô đơn trong cô, thắp lên sự gắn kết mãnh liệt. Nhưng khi những bí mật bị chôn vùi dần hé lộ, họ phải cùng nhau minh oan cho anh và đấu tranh vì tương lai của cả hai.

title: Tình Yêu Tựa Tuyết Đầu Mùa
genre: Billionaire, Marriage of Convenience, Serendipity, Glow-Up, Reunion Years Later, One Night Stand
synopsis_or_hook: Mắc kẹt trên chuyến tàu ngập tuyết, Ophelia James bị hạ thuốc và lỡ trao thân cho một người lạ mặt rồi mang thai. Mười tháng sau, cô kết hôn giả với Simon Rhodes mà không ngờ rằng anh trai anh - Harrison, người đứng đầu gia tộc Rhodes khét tiếng - chính là người đàn ông đêm đó. Từng bị chẩn đoán nhầm là vô sinh, Harrison giấu kín khát khao, sắm vai người anh chồng tốt bụng để âm thầm bảo vệ cô. Mối nhân duyên nảy nở từ màn tuyết đầu mùa đã trở thành định mệnh mà anh sẵn sàng đánh đổi tất cả để giữ lấy. Ophelia đã làm tan chảy trái tim băng giá của người đàn ông lạnh lùng ấy, trở thành sự cuồng si duy nhất đời anh.

title: บายกันทีครอบครัวนี้ที่แสนชัง
genre: Drama, Family Drama, Modern, Emotional, Sentimental, Teen
synopsis_or_hook: ในบ้านไซอนจิที่เคยอาศัยอยู่ร่วมกันราวกับครอบครัว จู่ ๆ เด็กสาวอย่างมิซากิก็ถูกต้อนให้จนมุมในฐานะคนทรยศ เธอถูกใส่ร้ายทั้งเรื่องยักยอกเงินบริจาคและเรื่องใช้ความรุนแรง แม้แต่เรนกับโชที่เป็นพี่ชายก็ยังไม่เชื่อใจเธอ จนทำให้เธอสูญเสียที่ยืนของตัวเองไป มิซากิที่ตกอยู่ในความสิ้นหวังจึงล้มเลิกทุกสิ่งทุกอย่างและเดินจากบ้านหลังนั้นไป

title: เมื่อคำว่านิรันดร์ไม่มีจริง
genre: Samantha Drews, Ryan Jacobucci, EmilyRose Morris, Volodymyr Pielikh, Housewife, Disabled
synopsis_or_hook: เนื่องในโอกาสครบรอบแต่งงานปีที่หก นาตาลีตั้งใจจะเซอร์ไพรส์อีธาน สามีของเธอ เธอจึงเดินทางไปยังคลินิกเพื่อตรวจสอบสเปิร์มที่เขาเคยฝากเอาไว้ ทว่ากลับต้องพบความจริงอันน่าตกใจว่าเขาแอบมาถอนมันออกไปตั้งนานแล้ว ปรากฏว่าเขาเอาสเปิร์มนั้นไปบริจาคให้แฟนเก่าผู้เป็นรักแรกในวัยเด็ก เพื่อให้เธอคนนั้นได้อุ้มท้องลูกของเขา และในตอนนี้ ผู้หญิงคนนั้นได้กลับมาแล้วพร้อมกับเด็กที่เป็นเลือดเนื้อเชื้อไขของอีธาน และที่เลวร้ายยิ่งกว่านั้นคือ อีธานถึงกับพาผู้หญิงคนนั้นและลูกเข้ามาอยู่ในบ้านของพวกเธอ ราวกับว่าที่นี่เป็นที่ของพวกเขามาตั้งแต่แรก หลังจากถูกหักหลังและเหยียบย่ำหัวใจซ้ำแล้วซ้ำเล่า ในที่สุดนาตาลีก็ตัดสินใจได้อย่างเด็ดขาด เธอพอแล้ว เธอต้องการหย่า และจะเดินจากไปจากชีวิตเขาตลอดกาล อีธานจะสามารถยื้อชีวิตคู่ครั้งนี้เอาไว้ได้ทันเวลาก่อนที่มันจะสายเกินไปหรือไม่ หรือนาตาลีจะอันตรธานหายไป ก่อนที่เขาจะทันได้รู้ตัวว่า ตัวเองได้สูญเสียผู้หญิงที่ดีที่สุดในชีวิตไปเสียแล้ว

title: ปราบพวกอันธพาลของฉัน 2
genre: Meg Bush, Cameron Porras, Luke Dodge, Travis Owens, Grant Lowell Garcia, Student
synopsis_or_hook: จากอดีตศัตรูสู่คนรักในปัจจุบัน ทว่า รณกร และ เอม กลับต้องเผชิญหน้ากับบททดสอบครั้งใหม่ในฐานะคู่ชีวิต เมื่อพวกเขาต้องรับมือกับคู่หมั้นสาวโปรไฟล์เริ่ดระดับทายาทมหาเศรษฐีที่พร้อมทำทุกวิถีทางเพื่อแย่งชิงรณกรมาครอบครอง ไหนจะคุณแม่จอมบงการที่ยึดติดกับฐานะทางสังคมอย่างไม่ยอมอ่อนข้อ และที่สำคัญที่สุดคือ ความหวาดหวั่นภายในใจของเอมเองว่าเธอไม่มีวันจะกลมกลืนเข้าไปในโลกอันหรูหราของเขาได้เลย เอมเคยเชื่อมั่นว่าความรักที่พวกเขาฝ่าฟันจับมือกันมาอย่างยากลำบากจะสามารถเอาชนะความแตกต่างระหว่างกันได้ แต่ถ้าหากว่าการเดินหันหลังลาจากโรแวนไป คือทางเลือกที่ถูกต้องที่สุดแล้วล่ะ

title: I Let Her Raise the Wrong Son
genre: All, Drama, Suspense, Revenge, Family Drama, Comeback Story
synopsis_or_hook: Killed by his family, Matt Nield died watching his true savior fall. Reborn, he switches the babies. The love child of his cheating wife gets her abuse; the adopted son from his last life gets the throne. The cheaters never suspect, until the reveal shatters them. Broke and desperate, they plot to kill him again. Then he rises from his own funeral. And the grave they dug? It's theirs now.

title: 喜當爹十八年，重生後我讓你們跪著哭
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook:
林墨前世被妻子姜雪瑤、情夫趙濤和養子林之遠聯手害死，臨死才知道自己替別人養了十八年兒子，而養子林之恆為救他慘死。重生回到十八年前，他將姜雪瑤的親生兒子林之遠與摯友遺孤林之恆互換，讓姜雪瑤親手虐待自己的骨肉十八年。
升學宴上，林墨將集團交由林之恆打理，姜雪瑤帶著趙濤恬不知恥地上前認親，不料林墨反手甩出親子鑑定，證明林之遠才是姜雪瑤的親子，姜雪瑤崩潰，林之遠憤然離去。林墨收回對姜家的幫助使其破產，並冷眼旁觀趙濤的賭債爆發。
姜雪瑤和趙濤試圖用輿論逼林墨給錢，反被林墨當眾揭穿偽造自殺、轉移財產等罪行，姜雪瑤被迫簽字離婚淨身出戶，並和趙濤一起被治安隊抓走。
從拘留所出來後，債主再次找上門，二人被逼到絕境，決定除掉林墨和林之恆扶持林之遠上位得到林氏。林之遠猶豫後暗中向林墨通風報信，林墨將計就計。
靈堂上，姜雪瑤和趙濤得意宣佈繼承遺產，林墨帶著林之恆“死而復生”，治安隊趕到將二人抓獲。最終姜雪瑤和趙濤數罪併罰被判無期徒刑，林墨也徹底改變上輩子含恨而死的命運。

title: Я отвергла пятерых Альф
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Десять лет назад Элару приютил Альфа стаи Грозового клыка, и ей предстояло выбрать в пару одного из его пяти сыновей. Но все пятеро братьев попадают под чары коварной служанки-Омеги, а Элару ждут лишь унижения и боль. В день своего восемнадцатилетия, измученная предательством, она отвергает связь истинных пар и объявляет о помолвке с самым загадочным и могущественным оборотнем — Ксавьером Локхартом. Когда братья наконец прозреют, будет уже слишком поздно. Но какую тёмную тайну скрывает Ксавьер? И сможет ли Элара разрушить смертельное проклятие, нависшее над её новой любовью?

title: The Ash Room for Bad Neighbors
genre: All, Drama, Suspense, Revenge, Modern, Regrettable
