synopsis_or_hook: Willa buys a ground‑floor home but is bullied by vicious neighbors. Her counterattack of building an ash room unexpectedly exposes a buried corpse. The haunting rumors, midnight digging, and murder cover‑up unravel; the killers are jailed. Willa receives compensation and a fresh start.

title: 惡鄰逼走我後，我把一樓改成骨灰房
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook:
林晚花光積蓄買下一樓帶院子的老房，卻被樓上張強、王梅帶頭扔垃圾，物業不管，鄰居反勸她忍氣吞聲。一怒之下，她將房子改造成骨灰寄存室，以“死後做鄰居”的狠招反擊。
不料真有人求存骨灰，她心軟收下。隨後鬧鬼傳聞四起，警察責令拆除。拆除當晚，她蹲守發現張強、王梅偷偷挖自家院子——地下竟埋著一具屍體。真相大白：兩人為賴賬殺人埋屍。惡鄰鋃鐺入獄，林晚獲得賠償與遺產，另尋獨棟小院，終於過上嚮往的生活。

title: The Virgin's Christmas Wish
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook:
Christmas Eve. After Thistle is publicly torn apart for still being a virgin, she makes a desperate wish to Santa: "Please let me lose it."
Thistle never expects the one who answers her wish to be the campus bad boy, mafia heir... and her soon-to-be stepbrother.

title: 失墜パパ 〜 人命救助したら人生終了した件〜
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: 冴えないサラリーマン・後藤誠児は、反抗期の娘・愛海に弁当を届ける最中、目の前で倒れた若い女性を助けようと人命救助を行う。しかしその女性の正体は、SNSで意図的に炎上を狙うインフルエンサー・千紗都だった。彼女の策略に嵌った誠児は、”性犯罪者”というレッテルを貼られてしまう。会社をクビになり、愛海や妻・晴香までも周囲から白い目を向けられる地獄の日々。自身の無実を証明し、平和な生活を取り戻そうとする誠児だったが、再び千紗都によって窮地に陥ってしまうのだった—。愛する家族を助けるため、全てを失った「失墜パパ」は、大きな賭けに出る。

title: 記憶を失った奴隷妻
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook:
母を火事で失い、自身も記憶喪失となった香奈。放浪する最中、偶然出会った紘一と恋に落ち結婚する。しかし、待ち受けていたのは香奈の存在を認めない紘一の母、奈津子に奴隷のように扱われる地獄の日々だった...
虐げられ続け、家から飛び出すと交通事故にあい、それがきっかけで記憶を取り戻した香奈は奈津子に復讐することを誓い、記憶喪失の状態を装い計画を立てていくが、その過程で驚くべき真実が明らかになるーー
香奈と紘一、奈津子の運命の歯車が動き出す。

title: イケメン留学生の愛情表現がオレには効きすぎる
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook:
"""夏の帰省先でアサヒを待っていたのは、日本茶に惚れ込み、
お茶作りを住み込みで手伝うフランスからのイケメン留学生、ルイ。
無防備な笑顔に優しい言葉、そして不意に交わされるキスに戸惑いを
隠せないアサヒは、同じ部屋に同じ布団で寝るシチュエーションと、
フランス仕込みのボディタッチに戸惑いながらもルイと同じ時間を過ごす。
触れられるたび、見つめられるたびに、自分の中の“普通”が崩れていく。
この夏休み、距離感ゼロの同居生活でアサヒが選ぶ“本当の気持ち”とは―
ゼロ距離フランス男子×純粋な日本の大学生、文化や感情の違いが織り成すBLドラマ""

title: สัญญารักคุณสามีพันล้าน
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook:
เรื่องราวความรักสุดคอมเมดี้ในเมืองใหญ่ เมื่อความรักเริ่มหลังแต่งงานของคู่กัดสุดแสบ!
เพื่อทำลาย "คำสาปไร้ทายาท" ของตระกูล มหาเศรษฐีแห่งเมืองอ่าวมาเก๊าอย่าง "ตระกูลลี่" จึงเปิดรับสมัครสะใภ้แบบสาธารณะ 'ห่าวอวิ้น' หญิงสาวจากหมู่บ้านอี๋อวิ้น หมู่บ้านที่ขึ้นชื่อเรื่องลูกดก จึงตัดสินใจสมัครงานนี้เพื่อเงิน และได้เซ็นสัญญาแต่งงานกับ 'ลี่เส้าถิง' ประธานหนุ่มผู้ต่อต้านการแต่งงานอย่างรุนแรง
จากคู่กัดที่ต่างคนต่างไม่ชอบขี้หน้า ค่อยๆ แปรเปลี่ยนเป็นความผูกพันลึกซึ้ง ทั้งสองร่วมมือกันทลายแผนสมคบคิดทางธุรกิจ กระชากหน้ากากความจริงเบื้องหลัง "คำสาป" จนในที่สุดก็ได้ครองรักกันด้วยความจริงใจ

title: เจ้าสาวสังเวยมังกร ดันได้สามีคลั่งรัก
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook:
เพื่อช่วยชีวิตน้องสาวที่ป่วยหนัก เธอจำต้องรับชะตากรรมแทนลูกพี่ลูกน้องผู้เห็นแก่ตัว และถูกส่งไปแต่งงานกับดยุกมังกรผู้เลื่องชื่อในด้านความโหดเหี้ยม จนผู้คนต่างหวาดกลัว
ทว่าเมื่อได้ก้าวเข้าสู่คฤหาสน์ของเขา เธอกลับพบว่าความจริงอาจแตกต่างจากข่าวลือที่ได้ยินมาโดยสิ้นเชิง
ท่ามกลางการแต่งงานที่เริ่มต้นจากการเสียสละ ความลับที่ถูกซ่อนเร้น และความสัมพันธ์ที่ค่อย ๆ เปลี่ยนแปลง เธอจะสามารถค้นพบความสุขและเปลี่ยนแปลงชะตาชีวิตของตนเองได้หรือไม่

title: จอมราชันป่วนโรงเรียน
genre: Drama, Royalty/Nobility, Rebirth, Meet Again, Exciting, The Chosen One
synopsis_or_hook: หลี่จี้ อ๋องผู้สำเร็จราชการแห่งต้าเซี่ย ผู้กวาดล้างหกรัฐจนราบคาบ กลับถูกฮ่องเต้วางแผนกำจัด เขากลับชาติมาเกิดเป็นนักเรียนมัธยมปลายผู้ขี้ขลาดในยุคปัจจุบัน เมื่อได้รับชีวิตใหม่ เขาเปลี่ยนจากคนอ่อนแอเป็นคนเด็ดขาด จัดการตบหน้าพวกนักเลงที่มารังแก ต่อมาเขาพบว่า ฉู่อู่ เพื่อนร่วมชั้น มีทั้งชื่อและใบหน้าเหมือนกับคู่หมั้นในชาติที่แล้วไม่ผิดเพี้ยน ในเวลาเดียวกัน เขายังต้องเผชิญหน้ากับสมาคมเซิ่งไฉซึ่งนำโดย โจวคุนและปรมาจารย์กัว ที่หมายยึดครองทรัพย์สินตระกูลฉู่

title: Rejected & Rebel, Tycoon Rise
genre: Fantasy, Supernatural, The Chosen One, Identity Reveal, Damsel Rescue, Underdog Story
synopsis_or_hook: After a bad date, Ryan activates the Rebel Girls System: gets rebel girls' love to unlock rewards. Unlimited wealth ahead!

title: Sleeping with My Ex Husband's Son
synopsis_or_hook: Natalie built a thriving company but endured a disastrous marriage. Her ex-husband, Harrison, was caught having an affair with her female intern in the office — then had the gall to mock her as “a dead fish in bed.” Enraged, Natalie slapped him and walked out without looking back. After the divorce, Natalie unexpectedly crosses paths with Harrison’s son, Sebastian. But this meeting is no accident — eight years earlier, when he was still underage, Sebastian had already developed a secret infatuation with her. Now, driven by a need for revenge against his father, he hides his true identity as a powerful heir and joins Natalie’s company as her new intern. By day, Natalie is Sebastian’s boss. By night, Sebastian controls her deepest desires. Bound by a sexual pact, they become entangled in a web of lust and deception, navigating corporate battles, family vendettas, and the messy entanglements of the heart.

title: My call boy, my loyal CEO！
synopsis_or_hook:
Zoe is a computer genius, but she mistakenly identified Daniel as her benefactor and married him.
After three years of marriage, Zoe realized that Daniel didn’t love her at all—instead, he had always looked down on her and used her. Framed by Daniel, she was forced out of their joint company with nothing and lost the patents she had already registered. Choosing to divorce, Zoe started over and launched her own business. To protect her patent ownership, Zoe decided to have a child to inherit them. In a hurry, she sought a "cheap and reliable" male escort for the purpose, only to end up with the young and exceptional Noah. Though she never intended to fall in love, Zoe found herself ensnared in the seductive trap of this domineering CEO...

title: Widow to Queen: The Alpha's Resurrection
synopsis_or_hook: Terminally ill and impoverished, Isla seeks one last reckless night—only to accidentally sleep with Jared Camsey, a ruthless mafia boss. When Jared is supposedly assassinated, Isla, now pregnant with his heir, inherits his criminal empire overnight. But Jared isn’t dead—he’s a werewolf who survived the shooting. Disguised as her bodyguard, he secretly protects her, and passion ignites between them. Everything shatters when Damon, the ambitious underboss, forces Isla to choose: her unborn child or the 'bodyguard' she’s grown to love. In a desperate moment, the bodyguard tears off his mask—revealing Jared’s face…

title: Mafia Diva: Reborn From The Flames
synopsis_or_hook: When Chloe was a child, she saved a little boy named Jonathan from the streets. Ten years later, he became a self-made billionaire. Rebecca, in order to take Chloe's place and reunite with Jonathan, didn't hesitate to push Chloe down the stairs, knock her unconscious, and bury her alive — saying she would take good care of Jonathan in place of Chloe, that ugly freak with a scar on her face. Chloe crawled out of the cold earth. Because she looked strikingly similar to the late granddaughter of mafia boss Bernardo, she was taken in by Bernardo, who happened to pass by and took pity on her. Three months later, after successful plastic surgery, Chloe made a glamorous return as Bernardo's granddaughter — the mafia princess — at the exact moment Jonathan and Rebecca were publicly announcing their upcoming wedding…

title: QB! Look what you made me do!
synopsis_or_hook: To cover her grandmother's sky-high medical costs, Nadia crashes a wedding as a faux mistress, escaping in rugby star Benjamin's jersey and unleashing a viral scandal over his inadvertent "cross-dressing" photo. Bound by a forced contractual marriage, she becomes a pawn for idol Paris, tasked with stealing Benjamin's playbook—a betrayal that plunges her into a moral quagmire. As misunderstandings spiral and kidnappings ensue, Benjamin's life-threatening injuries shatter Nadia's loyalty to Paris. Yet when her hero sacrifices himself again to save her, crippling guilt drives her to vanish. With past secrets and present dangers colliding, can love survive the wreckage of their star-crossed pact?

title: The Encore of Us
synopsis_or_hook:
To protect her beloved boyfriend Noah, Amelia accidentally causes her father’s “death.” In order to safeguard their shared dream of a musical future, she hides her pregnancy, pretends to cheat, breaks up with Noah, and turns herself in—serving seven years in prison.
Upon release, Amelia discovers their daughter Lisa has leukemia, and only umbilical cord blood can save her. With no other choice, she approaches Noah-now a global music star, and reconnects with him physically, hiding the truth behind her return. Noah has never stopped loving her, but the heartbreak of Amelia‘s sudden betrayal still lingers. As they’re drawn back into each other’s orbit, love and pain collide. Just when the truth begins to surface, her “dead” father suddenly reappears...

title: Breaking Chains for a New Life
synopsis_or_hook: The adopted daughter Rachel of the Walker family stole her parents' belongings one day at home and was discovered by the biological daughter Emma. After a chase, Emma was pushed into the swimming pool by Rachel. Later, the Walker family, parents and brothers arrived, and Rachel falsely accused Emma of pushing her into the water. Emma was not only rejected by her family and driven out of the house but was also hit and killed by Rachel with a car. Unexpectedly, she was reborn and decided to stop pleasing anyone, exposing that innocent-looking but sly daughter and her biased family. After leaving home, she was taken in by her adoptive brother Daniel and reunited with her loving adoptive parents. Later, the three Walker brothers accidentally discovered Emma's phone and realized they had misunderstood her, trying to win her back...

title: Reborn to Find I Am the Mogul's Lost Love
synopsis_or_hook: Serena Miller had just handed her company over to Ethan Moore — and the moment he got it, he tried to run her down with a car so he could marry Carol. Ethan was the son of the Miller family's servant. Serena loved him, pitied his poor background, and treated him like family. He enjoyed everything she gave him — but for his own desires, he killed her mother, drained her of everything, and then ran her over with a car… Only on her deathbed did she learn that William Dupont, the man she had rejected as an arranged marriage match, had loved her all along. Reborn, Serena decides to cherish William and make Ethan pay for every drop of blood. She plays along with Ethan's act, letting him walk step by step toward his own destruction — without ever realizing it…

title: I'll Steal You Back
synopsis_or_hook: To save her sick boyfriend Daniel, Emily marries wealthy James in exchange for money—and lies to Daniel that she left him for greed. Three years later, Daniel returns as a billionaire. He deliberately gets close to Emily, manipulates James into making her his personal assistant, and seduces her into an affair of lust and moral destruction.

title: From Trash To Cash: How I Found A Billionaire
synopsis_or_hook: Orphan Emily, betrayed and drunk, accidentally hits a man named Snoke in a pile of trash. He loses his memory and believes he is her fiancé. As Snoke’s gentle company and constant good luck heal her heart, Emily falls for him. Just as she’s about to tell him the truth, Snoke is recognized as a missing billionaire heir… Can Emily’s dream last? And who is he really?

title: Alpha Membuangku, Takdir Memahkotai Aku
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Karya pembuka Trilogi Moon Goddess—Clara, yatim piatu darah campuran yang terbuang, ditolak di depan umum oleh seorang Alpha dan diberi cap aib. Setelah membangkitkan garis keturunan Moon Goddess, ia berubah menjadi Serigala Perang Silver Moon, bangkit dari keterpurukan, menghimpun kaum terbuang, dinobatkan menjadi ratu, dan menyegel Shadow Lord. Segala hinaan dan pengkhianatan di masa lalunya sirna begitu ia meraih keabadian. Namun, ini hanyalah awal dari legenda Moon Goddess—kegelapan belum sepenuhnya lenyap. Seribu tahun kemudian di bagian kedua, Isabella, penyintas terakhir Klan Moon Wolf, akan menjalani takdir yang terhubung dengan Raja Lycan Blake. Di masa depan yang lebih jauh lagi, garis keturunan generasi ketiga akan membawa trilogi ini menuju babak penutup pada perang akhir zaman.

title: My Forced Alpha Mate:Our Blood Calls
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: The opening masterpiece of the Moon God Trilogy—Clara, a forsaken mixed-blood orphan, is publicly rejected by an Alpha and branded with a mark of shame. After awakening the bloodline of the Moon God, she transforms into a Silver Moon Warwolf, rises from the ruins, rallies the outcasts, is crowned queen, and seals away the evil god. All the humiliation and betrayal of her past vanish the moment she gains immortality. But this is only the beginning of the Moon God’s legend—the shadows are not yet extinguished. A thousand years later, Isabella, the last survivor of the Moon Wolf Clan, will embark on a destiny entangled with Lycan King Blake in the second installment. And in the even more distant future, the third generation’s bloodline will bring the trilogy to its final chapter in the war of the end times.

title: โดนหักหลัง เลยเปิดร้านสู้กลับ
genre: All, Drama, Suspense, Revenge, Comeback Story, Modern
synopsis_or_hook:
ลู่หราน เชฟอัจฉริยะ ถูกพี่ชายลูกพี่ลูกน้องลู่จื้อเจี๋ยกดขี่และขับไล่ออกจากร้านที่เขาสร้างขึ้นมาเอง เขาจึงตัดสินใจเปิดร้านเล็ก ๆ ฝั่งตรงข้ามเพื่อพิสูจน์ฝีมือของตนเอง
ด้วยพรสวรรค์ด้านการทำอาหารและการสนับสนุนจากเซี่ยหนิง รวมถึงผู้ที่เห็นศักยภาพของเขา ชีวิตของลู่หรานเริ่มพลิกผันจากลูกจ้างธรรมดาสู่ผู้ประกอบการที่ได้รับการยอมรับ ขณะเดียวกันเขายังต้องเผชิญการขัดขวางจากอดีตคู่แข่งอย่างต่อเนื่อง และพิสูจน์ว่าความสามารถแท้จริงสามารถเอาชนะอำนาจและเล่ห์เหลี่ยมได้

title: 俺の体内に眠る龍が、今覚醒する！
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: 信じていた妻の冷酷な裏切り。財産をすべて奪われ、屈辱の底に突き落とされ、さらには最愛の幼い娘までもが重病に倒れた。莫大な治療費を前に為す術もなく、葉鋒は人生のどん底で深い絶望に打ちひしがれていた。すべてが闇に包まれたその時――奇跡が起きた。彼の血脈に深く眠っていた無双の「神龍の伝承」が、突如として覚醒したのだ。天を逆撫でする力が宿り、運命の歯車が逆回転を始める。深淵から舞い戻った龍は、彼を縛るすべての鎖を断ち切る。圧倒的な力で都市を揺るがし、立ちはだかるすべての仇敵を容赦なく踏み潰す！

title: Suamiku Memberi Sperma Bekunya ke Mantannya
genre: Samantha Drews, Ryan Jacobucci, EmilyRose Morris, Volodymyr Pielikh, Housewife, Disabled
synopsis_or_hook: Natalie mau memberi kejutan ke suaminya Ethan di hari jadi keenamnya, jadi dia pergi ke klinik untuk periksa sperma yang disimpannya. Namun akhirnya menemukan kalau suaminya sudah lama mengambilnya! Ternyata suaminya mendonasikan ke mantannya agar dia bisa memiliki anaknya! Sekarang wanita itu kembali dengan anaknya. Yang terburuknya, Ethan membawa mereka ke rumah seakan itu rumah mereka. Setelah mengecewakannya berulang kali, Natalie akhirnya memutuskan untuk mengakhirinya. Dia menginginkan perceraian dan pergi untuk selamanya. Akankah Ethan bisa menyelamatkan pernikahan mereka sebelum berakhir, atau akankah Natalie menghilang sebelum Ethan menyadari dia kehilangan wanita yang sangat baik?

title: พันธะรักมนตราจินนี่
genre: Eric Guilmette, Nikki Leigh, Kyle Glenn, Raina Silver, Romance, Toxic Romance
synopsis_or_hook: อีไล บาราน จินนี่ในตะเกียงวิเศษ ได้รับอิสรภาพจากพรสุดท้ายของมหาเศรษฐี แต่ต้องแต่งงานกับคริสติน หลานสาวของเขาเป็นเวลา 5 ปี อีไลคอยช่วยเหลือเธอจนประสบความสำเร็จ ทว่ากลับถูกเมินและดูถูกเสมอ เมื่อรักเก่าของเธอกลับมา อีไลจึงต้องเลือกว่าจะอยู่ต่อ หรือหย่าเพื่อทวงชีวิตของตัวเองคืน

title: Powrót króla żebraków
genre: Luke Charles Stafford, Samantha Drews, Sarah Jayne Rothkopf, Thomas Ronin Lee, Drama, Comeback Story
synopsis_or_hook:
Podczas wystawnego przyjęcia na jachcie, potentat z Wall Street, Ryan Chase, zostaje otruty i wypchnięty za burtę przez własną narzeczoną, Mię. Cudem uchodzi z życiem, lecz traci głos, pamięć i całe swoje bajeczne bogactwo.
Porzucony i pozbawiony tożsamości, odnajduje schronienie w skromnej restauracji, prowadzonej przez Sophię – życzliwą, niemą kobietę. Mimo ciągłych upokorzeń ze strony złośliwej macochy Sophii, między Ryanem a jego wybawicielką rodzi się uczucie. Gdy ojciec Sophii poważnie choruje, Ryan staje w obronie nowej rodziny.
W tym samym czasie bezwzględna Mia fałszuje dokumenty, by przejąć wielomiliardowe imperium Ryana. Tylko jego lojalny asystent, Thomas, ryzykuje wszystko, by chronić resztki fortuny. 
Gdy Diane odkrywa prawdziwą tożsamość Ryana, a mimo to odmawia pomocy umierającemu Jamesowi, miarka się przebiera. Ryan w końcu kontaktuje się z Thomasem. Jest gotów, by powrócić na pole bitwy i odebrać to, co do niego należy.

title: 「Synchronisierung」Die Rückkehr des Bettlerkönigs
genre: Luke Charles Stafford, Samantha Drews, Sarah Jayne Rothkopf, Thomas Ronin Lee, Drama, Comeback Story
synopsis_or_hook: Wall-Street-Mogul Ryan Chase wird von seiner Verlobten Mia auf einer Luxusjacht vergiftet und über Bord gestoßen. Er überlebt wie durch ein Wunder, verliert aber seine Stimme, seine Identität und sein gesamtes Vermögen. Die stumme Sophia rettet ihn und nimmt ihn in das kleine Restaurant ihrer Familie auf. Trotz ständiger Schikanen durch Sophias boshafte Stiefmutter Diane kommen sich Ryan und Sophia näher und verlieben sich. Als Sophias Vater James schwer erkrankt, stellt sich Ryan an die Seite der Familie. Derweil versucht Mia mit einer gefälschten Heiratsurkunde, Ryans Milliarden-Imperium an sich zu reißen. Sein treuer Assistent Thomas riskiert alles, um das Erbe zu schützen. Als Diane Ryans wahre Identität entdeckt und James weiter im Stich lässt, kontaktiert Ryan endlich Thomas. Er ist bereit, in den Kampf zurückzukehren und sich zurückzuholen, was ihm gehört.

title: Kuchařská královna: Recept na rozvod
genre: Rosa Singerman, Jesse Morales, Keagan Dollarhide, Natalie Jane Cutting, Drama, Strong Heroine
synopsis_or_hook: Tiffany, kdysi legendární „Královna kuchyně“, se vzdala své slávy, aby podpořila svého manžela Barryho. Barry ji ale podrazí, dá přednost své milence Sere a chová se k Tiffany, jako by nestála za nic. Se zlomeným srdcem Tiffany bloumá bez cíle, až ji osud přivede do malé restaurace Clauda. Tam se v ní znovu probudí její skrytý talent a ohromí kritiky svým kulinářským uměním. Pak znovu narazí na Barryho.

title: Falešná přítelkyně pro svatbu
genre: Marc Hermann, Meg Bush, Richard Neil, Jennifer Holcombe, Romance, Sweet Romance
synopsis_or_hook: Když se Reese po čtyřech letech nečekaně znovu setká se svým bývalým nejlepším kamarádem a první láskou Graysonem, který jí kdysi zlomil srdce, souhlasí, že mu bude dělat falešnou přítelkyni na svatbě jeho sestry. Jenže staré city se začnou znovu drát na povrch a Reese musí rozhodnout, jestli šance na opravdovou lásku stojí za riziko, že se historie bude opakovat.

title: Doučuju kluka od konkurence
genre: Evan Gambardella, Sky Kawai, Marcus Wells, Heaven, Sean McHugh, LGBTQ
synopsis_or_hook: Život není pro Chrise Blanninga, premianta na nafoukané soukromé škole, vůbec snadný. Už tak má dost šikany, a když mu stipendium nestačí na školné, musí doučovat svého největšího nepřítele — Luciena Alarica, rozmazleného „bad boya“, kterého právě viděl, jak se snaží svést jejich učitelku, aby mu zlepšila známky! A aby toho nebylo málo, Lucien mu za to odhalil jeho nejhlubší a nejšpinavější tajemství. Chrisovi nezbývá než držet si přátele blízko… a nepřátele ještě blíž — jenže možná se k Lucienovi dostává až moc blízko…

title:
Na útěku:
svobodná matka v jeho náručí
genre: Single Mom, Housewife, Billionaire, Strong-Willed, Flash Marriage, Love After Marriage
synopsis_or_hook: Svobodná matka Maria uteče od týrání a bojuje, aby ochránila svou dceru Judy. Od těžkého života v továrně až po elitní školy čelí nepřátelům, zradě vlastní rodiny i nečekané lásce. Když do jejího života vstoupí miliardář Levi, všechno se změní…

title: [Dubbing] Super Ojciec Chrzestny: Była błaga mnie na kolanach
genre: Marc Herrmann, Julia Clarke, Mariia Mytrofanova, Domenic Jungling, Drama, Rags to Riches
synopsis_or_hook: Cain Hunter jest człowiekiem złamanym po tym, jak jego żona go zdradziła i zrujnowała finansowo. Gdy wydaje się, że wszystko jest już stracone, Cain niespodziewanie zostaje sprowadzony przed oblicze tajemniczego Dona Ludwiga, który składa mu propozycję: jeśli przejdzie jego próby, zostanie nowym Ojcem Chrzestnym syndykatu Bourne.

title: Skandál
genre: Marc Hermann, Meg Bush, Richard Neil, Jennifer Holcombe, Romance, Dark Romance
synopsis_or_hook: Inspirováno románem nejprodávanější autorky L. J. Shen. Když je mladá a výbušná Eddie donucena pracovat pro něj a špehovat nemilosrdného rivala svého otce, Trenta RexRotha, jejich nenávist se postupně změní v zakázanou touhu — vztah s velkým věkovým rozdílem, který je může oba zničit.

title: Keine Frau von gestern
genre: Haley Lohrli, Michael Joseph Nelson, Christine Gonzalez, Nate Flores, Romance, Toxic Romance
synopsis_or_hook: Trina, eine Hausfrau, die von ihrem Ehemann betrogen und von der gesamten Familie gedemütigt wird, findet endlich die Kraft, ihr liebloses Zuhause zu verlassen. Ihr Countdown in die Freiheit beginnt.

title: Iubire sub numele greșit
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: După un accident în copilărie care i-a despărțit pe Christian și Lily, el a căutat-o timp de 20 de ani. De aceea o tratează cu dispreț pe Joyce, soția lui doar pe hârtie. Dar exact când o aduce la capătul puterilor, descoperă că ea este iubirea lui pierdută!

title: Loving You in the Wrong Name
genre: Divorce, Mistaken Identity, Reunion as Strangers, Misunderstanding, Identity Reveal, Divorce
synopsis_or_hook: After a childhood accident separated Christian Douglas and Lily Rivers, he spent 20 years looking for her. Which is also why he relentlessly trashes his in-name-only wife, Joyce. But just as he pushes her to the edge, he discovers she is actually his long-lost love!

title: Không Còn Anh Trong Đời
genre: Drama, Mom-and-Son, Absurd, Regrettable, Housewife, CEO
synopsis_or_hook: Valerie Reed, người đứng đầu thực sự của Tập đoàn Zenith, đã lui về làm nội trợ để hậu thuẫn chồng mình, Calvin Hayes. Suốt 7 năm, cô không quản mệt nhọc chăm lo gia đình và túc trực khi anh ốm nặng. Thế nhưng, sự tận tâm của cô lại bị đền đáp bằng sự phản bội tột cùng. Tại tiệc 100 ngày của con trai Noah Hayes, Calvin công khai đưa nhân tình Mia Reed và con riêng Jackson Hayes về nhà. Được bố mẹ chống lưng, anh ra tối hậu thư cho Valerie: để Mia dọn vào ở và cô ở lại làm bảo mẫu cho nhà họ Hayes, hoặc ly hôn và mất quyền nuôi con.

title: Królowa Odpuszczania
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Po tragicznym wypadku, w którym ginie wraz z rodzicami, June wreszcie poznaje prawdziwe oblicze rodziny. Odradza się na nowo i zrywa z cudzymi zasadami. Skupia się wyłącznie na dawnym wrogu, który jako jedyny opłakiwał jej śmierć. Od teraz ignoruje firmowe kryzysy, pozwala siostrze uwieść narzeczonego i bije brawo, gdy dziadkowie oddają majątek kuzynowi. Rodzina tonie w chaosie i błaga ją o ratunek.

title: The Unexpected Divine Doctor
genre: The Chosen One, Zero to Hero, Damsel Rescue, Secret Reveal, Underdog Story, The Chosen One
synopsis_or_hook: Medical student James Madden accidentally gains X-ray vision. After being framed, he uses his new powers to exact swift revenge on his enemies. He then saves a billionaire's daughter, outshines top medical experts, and strikes it rich by finding rare antiques and playing the stock market.

title: El inesperado médico divino
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: El estudiante de medicina James Madden obtiene visión de rayos X por accidente. Tras ser incriminado, usa sus poderes para vengarse. Luego salva a la hija de un magnate, supera a los mejores médicos y se hace rico con antigüedades y en la bolsa.

title: Mata Dewa Sang Dokter
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Mahasiswa kedokteran James Madden tak sengaja mendapat mata tembus pandang. Usai dijebak, ia memakai kekuatan barunya untuk membalas dendam. Ia lalu menyelamatkan putri miliarder, mengungguli pakar medis top, dan meraup kekayaan dari barang antik langka serta bermain saham.

title: ยอดลูกเขยสยบปฐพี
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: ฉินชวน นักศึกษาแพทย์ ได้รับพลังพิเศษมองทะลุเห็นทุกอย่างได้โดยไม่คาดคิด เขาเริ่มจากการช่วยชีวิตลูกสาวมหาเศรษฐี ตบหน้าผู้เชี่ยวชาญระดับแนวหน้าในวงการแพทย์ เก็บของเก่าตกหล่นจนได้ของล้ำค่า และทำกำไรมหาศาลจากการเล่นหุ้น จนก้าวขึ้นเป็นมหาเศรษฐี

title: 神眼の天才医師～無能と蔑まれた男の逆転劇～
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: 平凡な医学生秦川は、ある日偶然透視の異能を手に入れた！その神眼で大富豪の令嬢を死の淵から救い出し、見下してきた医学界の権威たちのプライドを粉砕！さらに骨董品のお宝を掘り出し、株価の動きまで見抜いて瞬く間に億万長者へと成り上がっていく。兄弟分の危機には命を懸け、美女のピンチには颯爽と駆けつける秦川。負け組は一生這い上がれないなんて誰が言った？透視能力で富も名声も美女も手に入れ、世界を思いのままに楽しむ男の、痛快無双な大逆転劇が今始まる！

title: Süper Görüşlü Mucize Doktor
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Tıp öğrencisi James Madden kazara X-ray görüşü kazanır. İftiraya uğradıktan sonra yeni güçlerini kullanarak düşmanlarından anında intikam alır. Ardından milyarder bir ailenin kızını kurtarıp en iyi doktorları gölgede bırakır; nadide antikalar bulup borsada oynayarak köşeyi döner.

title: الطبيب المعجز ذو الرؤية السينية
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: يكتسب طالب الطب جيمس مادن قدرة الرؤية السينية بالصدفة. وبعد الإيقاع به، يستغل قواه الجديدة للانتقام سريعا من أعدائه. لاحقا، ينقذ ابنة ملياردير ويتفوق على كبار الأطباء، ويحصد ثروة طائلة باكتشاف تحف نادرة والمضاربة في البورصة.

title: A Dupla Vida de um Rei da Prisão
genre: Marc Herrmann, Jessie Vaughn, Marval Rex, Leah Gabriela, Billionaire, Secret Identity
synopsis_or_hook: Harrison chega ao fundo do poço após ser traído pela própria família de consideração. Ele decide ir para a prisão de propósito para reunir provas dos crimes deles. Após ser libertado, um casamento repentino une seu destino ao de Sophia, e os dois são rapidamente marginalizados, enfrentando humilhação, pobreza e o desprezo aberto daqueles que estão no poder. Enquanto Sophia busca uma chance de construir um novo futuro, Harrison é rotulado repetidamente como um ex-presidiário — até que um único momento dentro do edifício do Grupo Maple sinaliza que tudo o que acreditavam sobre ele pode estar completamente errado.

title: Mi jefe Alfa me dio trillizos
genre: Abigail Fawn, Mark H. McClafferty, Skyla Lynne
synopsis_or_hook:
Evie, una talentosa pero vulnerable diseñadora humana, queda ligada a Leopold, el despiadado alfa de la manada Stonehearth, y termina embarazada de sus trillizos. Para protegerla, Leopold la obliga a mudarse con él, presentando su relación como algo puramente transaccional, mientras en privado lucha contra los incontrolables instintos del lazo de apareamiento que lo hacen compartir el dolor y las emociones de Evie.

A medida que Evie se ve arrastrada al mundo corporativo y de la manada de Leopold, Darleen, una poderosa mujer lobo de otra manada decidida a quedarse con él, escala de las amenazas profesionales a las físicas. La ausente familia de Evie empeora las cosas al intentar secuestrarla. ¿Podrá Leopold priorizar a su compañera por encima de todo y salvarla del torbellino al que la arrastró?

title: Grávida de Trigêmeos do Alfa
genre: Abigail Fawn, Mark H. McClafferty, Skyla Lynne
synopsis_or_hook:
Evie, uma designer humana talentosa, mas vulnerável, acaba se ligando a Leopold, o implacável Alfa da Alcateia Stonehearth. Ela fica grávida de trigêmeos, o que é muito raro. Para protegê-la, Leopold a obriga a morar com ele, dizendo que o relacionamento deles é puramente transacional, enquanto, secretamente, luta contra seus instintos incontroláveis de vínculo, que o levam a compartilhar a dor e as emoções de Evie.
À medida que Evie se vê envolvida no mundo de Leopold, tanto na empresa quanto em sua alcateia, Darleen, uma poderosa loba de outra alcateia determinada a conquistar Leopold, passa de ameaças profissionais para ameaças físicas. A família distante de Evie agrava a situação ao tentar sequestrá-la. Será que Leopold será capaz de priorizar sua parceira acima de tudo e salvá-la do turbilhão em que a colocou?

title: One Night Stand with the Empire's General
genre: Historical, Upgrade from Ex, One Night Stand, Misunderstanding, Secret Reveal, Damsel Rescue
synopsis_or_hook:
To reclaim the vast fortune left behind by her grandfather, Viscountess Melris takes a desperate gamble at a masquerade ball. She seduces a mysterious silver-haired, red-eyed attendant in hopes of bearing his child — a child she plans to use as leverage to secure her inheritance. What she does not realize is that the man she has entangled herself with is none other than Eric, a ruthless and unhinged grand general who takes pleasure in killing.

Now, caught in his relentless pursuit, Melris must deceive the world, outwit her scoundrel husband, and eliminate the scheming maidservant — all while struggling to survive the dangerous game she has set in motion.

title: Satu Malam Bersama Jenderal
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook:
Demi merebut kembali kekayaan kakeknya, Viscountess Melris mengambil langkah nekat di pesta topeng. Ia menggoda pelayan misterius berambut perak dan bermata merah dengan harapan bisa mengandung anaknya—anak yang akan ia jadikan alat untuk mengamankan warisan. Tanpa disadari, pria yang ia goda tak lain adalah Eric, jenderal besar yang kejam, gila, dan gemar membunuh.

Kini, terjebak dalam kejaran Eric yang tak kenal ampun, Melris harus mengelabui dunia, mengecoh suaminya yang bajingan, dan menyingkirkan pelayan yang licik—sambil berjuang bertahan hidup dalam permainan berbahaya yang ia mulai sendiri.

title: ตกหลุมรักจริงเข้าแล้ว
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: เดซี่ หญิงสาวผู้ดิ้นรนเพื่ออนาคต ตัดสินใจทำข้อตกลงลับกับ จูเลียน สเตอร์ริง มหาเศรษฐีนักธุรกิจผู้ทรงอิทธิพล ทั้งคู่ตกลงทำสัญญาแต่งงานกันเป็นเวลาหนึ่งปี เมื่อเวลาผ่านไป ความสัมพันธ์ที่เริ่มต้นจากการแต่งงานตามสัญญากลับค่อย ๆ แปรเปลี่ยนเป็นความรักแท้

title: ドンキ系女子を驚かす大富豪！底辺男のチート人生
genre: Fantasy, Supernatural, The Chosen One, Identity Reveal, Damsel Rescue, Underdog Story
synopsis_or_hook: モテないアラサー男王強は、お見合いでまたしても惨敗。どん底の彼に突如インストールされたのは、謎のドンキ系女子驚愕システムだった！なんと、街のドンキ系女子たちをドン引きさせることで、ブロンズからダイヤまで様々なランクの宝箱を獲得できるという。宝箱からは大量の現金や、目を疑うようなチートアイテムが次々と飛び出してくる！システムの力で底辺から成り上がり、圧倒的な富を掴み取った王強。誰にも止められない、痛快無双な人生の大逆転劇が今、幕を開ける！

title: アルファの三つ子身ごもりました
genre: Abigail Fawn, Mark H. McClafferty, Skyla Lynne
synopsis_or_hook: 才能に満ち溢れる人間デザイナーイーヴィーはストーンハートの群れのアルファであるレオポルドの番になり、三つ子を身ごもる。レオポルドは彼女を守るため同居を強いるが、次第に番への想いを抑えられなくなる。一方、彼を狙う雌狼ダーリーンや、イーヴィーを利用しようとする家族が二人に試練を与える。二人は数々の危機を乗り越え、運命の絆を守れるのか。

title: Enceinte des triplés de mon patron Alpha
genre: Abigail Fawn, Mark H. McClafferty, Skyla Lynne
synopsis_or_hook: Créatrice de talent mais vulnérable, Evie se retrouve liée à Leopold, l’Alpha impitoyable de la meute Stonehearth, et tombe enceinte de ses rares triplés. Pour la protéger, Leopold la force à emménager chez lui, présentant leur relation comme purement transactionnelle. Pourtant, en secret, il lutte contre des instincts du lien d’âme incontrôlables qui le poussent à ressentir physiquement la douleur et les émotions d’Evie. Alors qu’Evie est aspirée dans le monde professionnel et lycanthrope de Leopold, Darleen, une puissante louve déterminée à le conquérir, passe des menaces professionnelles aux agressions physiques. Pour aggraver les choses, la famille éloignée d’Evie tente de l’enlever. Leopold saura-t-il faire passer sa compagne avant toute chose et la sauver de la tourmente qu’il a lui-même déclenchée ?

title: Die Drillinge des Alpha-Chefs
genre: Abigail Fawn, Mark H. McClafferty, Skyla Lynne
synopsis_or_hook:
Evie ist nur ein Mensch. Doch plötzlich ist sie die Gefährtin von Leopold, dem mächtigen Alpha des Stonehearth-Rudels – und schwanger mit seinen Drillingen. Um sie zu schützen, nimmt Leopold sie bei sich auf. Er behauptet, es sei nur eine Abmachung. Doch jedes Mal, wenn Evie leidet, spürt auch er ihren Schmerz.

Dann beginnen die Probleme. Eine rivalisierende Wölfin kämpft um Leopold. Evies Familie will sie zurückholen – um jeden Preis. Zwischen Liebe, Macht und Gefahr muss Leopold entscheiden: Wird er seine Gefährtin retten oder alles verlieren?

title: Terjerat Bos Alfa, Hamil Kembar Tiga
genre: Abigail Fawn, Mark H. McClafferty, Skyla Lynne
synopsis_or_hook: Evie si desainer berbakat terikat pada Leopold, Alfa kejam Kawanan Stonehearth, dan mengandung tiga anak langka darinya. Demi melindunginya, Leopold memaksa Evie tinggal bersamanya dengan status sebatas hubungan kontrak. Dia diam-diam berjuang melawan ikatan jodoh yang membuatnya merasakan sakit dan emosi Evie. Saat diterpa ancaman dari Darleen, serigala betina kuat dari kawanan serigala lain, dan keluarga Evie, Leopold harus memilih: melindungi pasangan takdirnya atau kehilangan dia selamanya.

title: บอสอัลฟ่าของฉัน ให้กำเนิดรักสามเท่า
genre: Abigail Fawn, Mark H. McClafferty, Skyla Lynne
synopsis_or_hook: อีวี่ ดีไซเนอร์มนุษย์ผู้มีพรสวรรค์แต่เปราะบาง ถูกผูกพันธะเข้ากับเลโอโพลด์ อัลฟ่าผู้เย็นชาและโหดเหี้ยมแห่งฝูงสโตนฮาร์ธ จนตั้งครรภ์ลูกแฝดสามอันหายากของเขา เพื่อปกป้องเธอ เลโอโพลด์จึงบังคับให้อีวี่ย้ายมาอยู่ด้วยกัน โดยอ้างว่าความสัมพันธ์ของพวกเขาเป็นเพียงข้อตกลงทางผลประโยชน์

title: Mój Alfa zrobił mi trojaczki
genre: Abigail Fawn, Mark H. McClafferty, Skyla Lynne
synopsis_or_hook: Evie, ludzka projektantka, zachodzi w ciążę z bezwzględnym Alfą, Leopoldem. Choć ich wspólne życie ma być tylko układem, trojaczki i potężna więź przeznaczenia zmieniają wszystko. Gdy na życie dziewczyny zaczyna czyhać zazdrosna wilczyca, Leopold musi zdecydować, czy obroni swoją przeznaczoną.

title: 알파의 삼둥이를 임신한 나
genre: Abigail Fawn, Mark H. McClafferty, Skyla Lynne
synopsis_or_hook: 인간 디자이너 에비는 무자비한 알파 레오폴드와 얽혀 그의 삼둥이를 임신한다. 에비를 지키기 위해 그는 그녀를 자기 집에 강제로 데려오고 둘이 그저 거래 관계라 하지만, 메이트 본능 때문에 그녀의 고통을 공유한다. 에비는 그의 세계에 휘말리고, 다른 무리의 암늑대 달린과 가족의 위협에 놓인다. 과연 그는 메이트인 에비를 지킬 수 있을까?

title: 이혼하고 만렙 신룡으로 각성함
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook:
독한 전처에게 비참하게 배신당하고, 전 재산까지 탈탈 털린 채 억울한 수모를 겪게 된 엽진혁.
설상가상으로 눈에 넣어도 아프지 않을 어린 딸마저 중병에 걸려, 당장 거액의 수술비가 필요한 절체절명의 위기에 처한다. 인생 최악의 바닥으로 추락해 앞날이 캄캄하던 그 순간! 벼랑 끝에 몰린 엽진혁에게 기적처럼 신룡의 전승을 각성한다. 하늘을 거스르는 치트키급 절대 혈통을 이어받으며 엽진혁의 운명은 180도 뒤바뀌게 되는데... 이제 온갖 제약을 부수고 진정한 용으로 승천한 엽진혁. 세계를 뒤흔드는 압도적인 무력으로, 자신을 짓밟았던 원수들을 향한 피도 눈물도 없는 핵사이다 참교육을 시작한다!

title: La doble vida de un rey de la prisión
genre: Marc Herrmann, Jessie Vaughn, Marval Rex, Leah Gabriela, Billionaire, Secret Identity
synopsis_or_hook: Harrison toca fondo tras ser traicionado por su propia familia política. Decide ir a prisión a propósito para reunir pruebas de los crímenes de su familia política. Después de salir en libertad, un matrimonio repentino une su destino al de Sophia, y ambos son rápidamente marginados, enfrentando humillaciones, pobreza y el desprecio abierto de quienes tienen el poder. Mientras Sophia persigue la oportunidad de construir un nuevo futuro, Harrison es señalado una y otra vez como exconvicto, hasta que un solo momento dentro del edificio del Grupo Maple revela que todo lo que creían sobre él podría estar equivocado.

title: Double vie d'un roi de cellule
genre: Marc Herrmann, Jessie Vaughn, Marval Rex, Leah Gabriela, Billionaire, Secret Identity
synopsis_or_hook: Trahi par sa belle-mère et son demi-frère, Harrison touche le fond. Il entre en prison pour prouver leurs crimes. Libéré, un mariage inattendu le lie à Sophia. Humiliés et rejetés, ils sombrent dans la misère. Harrison reste marqué comme ex-détenu, jusqu'au jour où un instant au Maple Group remet tout en question.

title: Der milliardenschwere Ex-Häftling
genre: Marc Herrmann, Jessie Vaughn, Marval Rex, Leah Gabriela, Billionaire, Secret Identity
synopsis_or_hook: Nach dem Verrat seiner Stieffamilie verliert Harrison alles. Um ihre Verbrechen aufzudecken, lässt er sich absichtlich ins Gefängnis bringen. Nach seiner Entlassung heiratet er unerwartet Sophia. Gemeinsam werden sie ausgegrenzt, gedemütigt und verachtet. Während Sophia um eine bessere Zukunft kämpft, wird Harrison als Ex-Häftling abgestempelt – bis ein unerwartetes Ereignis im Gebäude der Maple-Gruppe zeigt, dass Harrison vielleicht nicht der ist, für den ihn alle halten.

title: Mantan Napi Itu Ternyata Miliarder
genre: Marc Herrmann, Jessie Vaughn, Marval Rex, Leah Gabriela, Billionaire, Secret Identity
synopsis_or_hook: Dikhianati dan dijebak oleh keluarga tirinya, Harrison rela masuk penjara demi membongkar kejahatan mereka. Setelah bebas, ia terikat dalam pernikahan tak terduga dengan Sophia dan menjadi sasaran hinaan karena statusnya sebagai mantan narapidana. Namun, tak seorang pun menyadari bahwa di balik identitas sederhananya, Harrison menyimpan rahasia yang mampu mengubah segalanya.

title: ราชาเรือนจำผู้มีสองชีวิต
genre: Marc Herrmann, Jessie Vaughn, Marval Rex, Leah Gabriela, Billionaire, Secret Identity
synopsis_or_hook: แฮร์ริสันตกต่ำถึงขีดสุดหลังถูกครอบครัวเลี้ยงหักหลัง เขาจงใจเข้าคุกเพื่อรวบรวมหลักฐานอาชญากรรมของคนในครอบครัวเหล่านั้น หลังพ้นโทษ ชะตาชีวิตของเขากลับผูกพันเข้ากับโซเฟียผ่านการแต่งงานกะทันหัน และทั้งคู่ก็ถูกผลักให้ไปอยู่ชายขอบของสังคม ต้องเผชิญกับความอัปยศ ความยากจน และการดูแคลนจากผู้มีอำนาจ

title: Podwójne życie króla celi
genre: Marc Herrmann, Jessie Vaughn, Marval Rex, Leah Gabriela, Billionaire, Secret Identity
synopsis_or_hook: Harrison sięga dna po zdradzie ze strony własnej przybranej rodziny. Celowo trafia do więzienia, by zdobyć dowody ich przestępstw, a po wyjściu na wolność jego los niespodziewanie splata się z losem Sophii w nagłym małżeństwie. Oboje szybko zostają zepchnięci na margines, mierząc się z upokorzeniami, biedą i pogardą ze strony tych, którzy trzymają władzę. Podczas gdy Sophia walczy o szansę na lepszą przyszłość, Harrison nieustannie nosi piętno byłego skazańca. Wszystko zmienia się jednak w jednej chwili, gdy wydarzenia w siedzibie Maple Group ujawniają, że prawda o nim może być zupełnie inna, niż wszyscy dotąd sądzili.

title: 감방왕의 이중생활
genre: Marc Herrmann, Jessie Vaughn, Marval Rex, Leah Gabriela, Billionaire, Secret Identity
synopsis_or_hook: 해리슨은 의붓가족 배신으로 인생이 바닥 친다. 그는 그들의 범죄 증거 모으려 일부러 감옥 간다. 출소 후 갑작스러운 결혼으로 소피아와 얽히게 된다. 둘은 사회 말단으로 밀려나 굴욕과 멸시를 겪는다. 소피아가 새 미래를 좇을 때 해리슨은 전과자로 낙인찍힌다. 메이플그룹 빌딩에서 일어난 한 사건은 그에 대한 세상의 평가가 다 틀렸을지도 모른다는 신호를 보낸다.

title: 前科者の正体～監獄の王の二重生活～
genre: Marc Herrmann, Jessie Vaughn, Marval Rex, Leah Gabriela, Billionaire, Secret Identity
synopsis_or_hook: 継家族に裏切られ、全てを失ったハリソン。彼は復讐の証拠を掴むため、自ら囚人となる道を選んだ。出所後、ソフィアとの突然の結婚が彼の運命を大きく変える。権力者たちから浴びせられる屈辱、貧困、そして「前科者」という拭えない烙印……社会の片隅に追いやられた二人。だが、人々はまだ知らない。彼がその身に秘めた、もう一つの顔を。ある日を境に世界が彼を見る目は一変する。彼がただの元囚人ではないと知った時、壮絶な復讐劇の幕が上がる。

title: Mi ex es mi jefe
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Gavin Wright mantuvo a su novia Mandy Parker por tres años. El día de la boda, ella, ahora en el prestigioso Grupo Sewell, le exige una dote enorme y lo humilla. Harto, Gavin cancela el compromiso. Mandy ignora que él es el hijo perdido del CEO del Grupo Sewell. Al día siguiente, descubre impactada que su ex es el gerente general de la empresa y su jefe directo.

title: Fostul meu e șeful meu
genre: Drama, Family Drama, Mom-and-Son, Eye-opening, Regrettable, Office Worker
synopsis_or_hook: Gavin Wright a susținut-o financiar timp de 3 ani pe iubita lui, Mandy Parker. În ziua nunții, Mandy, acum la prestigiosul Grup Sewell, îi cere o sumă uriașă de bani și îl umilește în public. Sătul, Gavin anulează nunta. Ea nu are habar că el este de fapt fiul pierdut al CEO-ului Grupului Sewell. A doua zi, Mandy are un șoc: fostul ei este acum directorul general al companiei, adică șeful ei direct.

title: Bị Khước Từ: Sự Trỗi Dậy Của Tài Phiệt
genre: Fantasy, Supernatural, The Chosen One, Identity Reveal, Damsel Rescue, Underdog Story
synopsis_or_hook: Sau buổi hẹn thảm họa, Ryan kích hoạt Hệ Thống Gái Ngổ Ngáo: giành tình cảm của họ để nhận thưởng. Khối tài sản khổng lồ đang chờ phía trước!

title: Respinsă & Rebelă: Ascensiunea magnatului
genre: Fantasy, Supernatural, The Chosen One, Identity Reveal, Damsel Rescue, Underdog Story
synopsis_or_hook: Dupa un esec, Ryan activeaza Sistemul Fetelor Rebele: castiga iubirea lor si deblocheaza recompense. Il asteapta bogatii nesfarsite!

title: ฮีโร่คัมแบค ลูกสาวผมใครอย่าแตะ
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: เฉินชิ่งจือเร้นกายใช้ชีวิตเรียบง่ายกับครอบครัว เมื่อลูกสาวเจอมรสุม เขาตัดสินใจไม่นิ่งเฉยอีกต่อไป กิตติศัพท์ที่ถูกฝังกลบด้วยกาลเวลาหวนคืนอีกครั้ง ความอ่อนโยนในวันนี้มอบให้แต่สุดที่รัก เขายึดมั่นในอุดมกการณ์ และใช้ความสามารถทั้งหมดที่มีปกป้องครอบครัวให้มีความสุข

title: This Child Is a Legendary Sorcerer
genre: Strong-Willed, Damsel, Super Warrior, Multiple Identities, Super Power, Reincarnation
synopsis_or_hook:
Cole was the undisputed Supreme Sorcerer — until he died in a cataclysmic magical war. His soul reincarnated into the body of a young boy named Leo — a boy afflicted with a Death Curse, with little time left to live.
The only hope: the Starlight Potion, guarded by the arrogant Westwood family.
Leo’s mother, Clara, a powerless ordinary woman, humbled herself before the Westwoods, begging for the potion to save her son.They ridiculed her. Humiliated her. But Clara never backed down. 
Until Leo could take it no more.Something inside Leo shattered.
A pressure so immense it cracked the marble floor exploded from his tiny frame. The entire Westwood mansion trembled. Every sorcerer in the room was forced to their knees — their faces pressed to the ground, unable to breathe, unable to speak.
But no one knew: Clara herself had also been struck by the Death Curse. And in the end, for the sake of her child, she gave the only life-saving potion to Leo.

title: Reborn at the Final Play: You Lost Me for Good
genre: Athlete, Student, Rebirth, Revenge, Hidden Identity, Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: After her selfless attempt to save her football team led to betrayal and death, Katlyn Baker is reborn. In this life, she refuses to intervene as the ungrateful Maple Giants self-destruct, watching them lose their crucial game due to a sabotage scandal she exposes. Expelled and undervalued by her former team, she is approached by their rivals, the Alpha Wolves, who recognize her strategic genius. She leads them to a crushing victory over her old teammates, publicly humiliating the bully Jessica and the betrayer Logan who orchestrated her downfall, reclaiming her dignity and finding her own path to success with her new allies.

title: [Dubbing] Drugi wybór Luny
genre: Romance, Toxic Romance, Fantasy, Emotional, Romantic, Love Triangle
synopsis_or_hook: Dziesięć lat temu Elara została adoptowana przez Alfę Watahy Burzowego Kła i było jej przeznaczone wybrać sobie partnera spośród jego pięciu synów. Jednak pięciu braci zakochało się w manipulującej omedze, pokojówce Jenny, która knuła, by upokarzyć i dręczyć Elarę. Ze złamanym sercem i wyczerpana Elara publicznie odrzuca więź z braćmi w dniu swoich osiemnastych urodzin i ogłasza zaręczyny z tajemniczym i potężnym Księciem Lykanów, Xavierem Lockhartem. Gdy bracia w końcu odkrywają oszustwo Jenny i desperacko próbują odzyskać Elarę, zdają sobie sprawę, że jest już za późno. Elara odnajduje swojego prawdziwego partnera w Xavierze, łamiąć jego śmiertelną klątwę, i rozpoczyna nowe życie, zostawiając bolesną przeszłość za sobą.

title: เจ้านายป้ายแดงคือแฟนเก่า
genre: Drama, Family Drama, Mom-and-Son, Eye-opening, Regrettable, Office Worker
synopsis_or_hook:
หลินฝานส่งแฟนสาวเรียนจนจบ แต่กลับถูกเธอเรียกสินสอดเพิ่มและดูถูกสารพัดในวันแต่งงานจนต้องสะบั้นรัก
หารู้ไม่ว่าแท้จริงแล้วเขาคือทายาทซูกรุ๊ป และได้กลายมาเป็นท่านประธานเจ้านายสายตรงของเธอในวันต่อมา

title: Le Sage en ville : Retour en 24 heures
genre: Drama, Comeback Story, Fantasy, Feel-Good, Martial Arts, Visually Striking
synopsis_or_hook: Jason, étudiant, est propulsé dans le Monde de la Cultivation. Après 10 000 ans d'entraînement pour devenir un Sage, il rentre sur Terre où un seul jour s'est écoulé ! Avant son départ, son père est mort, son frère adoptif a ruiné sa mère, son ami Derek a volé son brevet et son rival lui a pris Alyssa. De retour, Jason compte bien faire payer ses bourreaux ! Il détruit les usuriers, sauve le patron du Groupe Reed et aide son admiratrice secrète Zoe à prendre sa revanche. Face aux menaces tapies sur Terre, il utilisera ses 10 000 ans de pouvoir pour tout anéantir sur son passage.

title: My Ex Is My Boss
genre: Drama, Family Drama, Mom-and-Son, Eye-opening, Regrettable, Office Worker
synopsis_or_hook: Gavin Wright spent three years funding his girlfriend Mandy Parker. On their wedding day, Mandy, now at the elite Sewell Group, tests him by demanding a massive bride price and publicly insulting him. Fed up, Gavin Wright cancels the wedding. Little does she know, he is the Sewell Group CEO's long-lost child. The next day, Mandy is shocked to find he is now the Sewell Group's general manager, her direct boss.

title: Traición y renacimiento
genre: Werewolf, Strong Heroine, All-Too-Late, Fantasy, Getting Back at Ex, Drama
synopsis_or_hook: Hace siete años, Selene, mi hermana menor adoptiva y una delicada omega, atropelló a alguien estando ebria y huyó, derramando sangre en la Frontera del Territorio Humano. Mi padre alfa, mi madre luna y mi hermana biológica me hicieron la misma súplica condescendiente: Selene es una omega, es muy frágil para la prisión. Si va a la Penitenciaría Silvermoon, su loba no sobrevivirá. Lyra, toma su lugar, por favor. Me negué. Pero en una noche de tormenta, mi padre usó su mando absoluto de alfa. Destruyó mi voluntad, controló mi mente y me entregó personalmente al transporte de la prisión. Mi prometido y pareja destinada, Kaelen, el alfa más fuerte de la manada, contuvo su furiosa aura de lobo y me dijo: Lyra, cuando salgas, completaremos el vínculo. Solo resiste estos siete años.

title: 햇살 품은 너에게
genre: Romance, Second Chance, Considerate, Regrettable, Love Triangle, Reunited Lovers
synopsis_or_hook: 어린 시절 교통사고로 여덟 살 때 실어증을 앓게 된 서청아, 성인이 되어 오랜 소꿉친구 주호진과 결혼하지만, 결혼 3년 만에 남편의 마음이 변하면서 혼란스러운 시간을 보낸다. 오랜 시간 조용히 곁을 지켜왔던 박연우는 더 이상 머뭇거리지 않고 곧바로 귀국해 한 걸음씩 그녀의 마음에 다가가려 한다.

title: Traição e Renascimento
genre: Werewolf, Strong Heroine, All-Too-Late, Fantasy, Getting Back at Ex, Drama
synopsis_or_hook: Há sete anos, a filha adotiva dos meus pais, minha irmã Selene, uma delicada Ômega, ficou bêbada, atropelou alguém e fugiu, deixando sangue na Fronteira do Território Humano. Meu pai Alfa, minha mãe Luna e minha irmã biológica vieram com o mesmo pedido condescendente: 'Selene é uma Ômega. É frágil demais. Se for para a Penitenciária Lua de Prata, a loba dela não sobrevive. Lyra, vá no lugar dela. Por favor.' Eu recusei. Mas numa noite de tempestade, meu pai usou o Comando Absoluto de Alfa. Ele quebrou minha vontade, controlou minha mente e me entregou pessoalmente ao transporte da prisão. Meu noivo e Companheiro Destinado, Kaelen, o Alfa mais forte da Alcateia, conteve sua Aura de Lobo e disse: 'Lyra, quando você sair, completaremos o laço. Aguente esses sete anos por enquanto.'

title: OTUZ YILLIK KORUMA  VE BİR İHANET
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Kıyamet geldiğinde, Cheng Feng ömrünü feda ederek insanları sığınağa korudu. Ancak otuz yıl sonra üvey kızı Cheng Xin ve hırslı Lu Wenjie tarafından ihanete uğradı; ikili sahte videolarla halkı kandırıp Cheng Feng’i darağacına gönderdi. İnsanlar sığınağı yıkarak yeşil vadeye yöneldi, ama devler ve Lu Wenjie’nin tuzağına düştüler. Peki, Cheng Feng kinini bir kenara bırakıp geliştirdiği mech teknolojisiyle insanlığı bir kez daha kurtaracak mı?

title: Oops! I Carried the Cursed Billionaire's Quadruplets
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: To save her dying mother, she sells her eggs. He witnesses this, mistaking her desperation for greed, and an unexpected night follows. Believing himself cursed and childless, he plans to disinherit his nephew. But then, she’s pregnant with his quadruplets. Seeking child support, she lands a job at a hotel, only to find her ex-boyfriend – the heir – attempting to seize her lover’s fortune. When her ex attacks her unborn children, the truth about her pregnancy and his impending doom crashes down on him.

title: Dokter Bilang Dia Mandul, Tapi Aku Hamil Empat
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Demi menyelamatkan sang ibu yang sekarat, dia menjual sel telurnya. Pria itu menyaksikannya, mengira keputusasaannya sebagai keserakahan, hingga terjadilah malam tak terduga. Yakin dirinya terkutuk dan takkan punya anak, pria itu berencana menghapus keponakannya dari hak waris. Namun ternyata, wanita itu mengandung bayi kembar empatnya! Demi mencari biaya hidup, dia bekerja di sebuah hotel, dan malah mendapati mantan pacarnya—sang pewaris—berusaha merebut harta kekasihnya. Saat sang mantan menyerang bayi dalam kandungannya, kebenaran tentang kehamilannya dan kutukan yang mengancam pria itu akhirnya terbongkar.

title: No más amor oculto
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Desesperada por pagar los gastos médicos de su madre, la universitaria Lyla Miller entra a la habitación equivocada y se enreda con Elias Thorne. La señora Thorne asegura que Lyla es la pareja ideal. Elias la salva de su padre abusivo, lo que da inicio a un matrimonio por contrato. Los malentendidos por las deudas paternas se aclaran cuando Elias descubre que ella trabaja estando embarazada. Él la defiende ferozmente de sus acosadores en la universidad. Al revelarse la verdadera identidad de Lyla, la pareja rompe el contrato y celebra la boda del siglo.

title: No More Hidden Love
genre: Billionaire, Marriage of Convenience, Damsel Rescue, One Night Stand, Misunderstanding, Flash Marriage
synopsis_or_hook: Desperate for her mother's medical fees, poor college student Lyla Miller enters the wrong room and gets involved with Elias Thorne. Madam Thorne insists Lyla is the perfect match. Elias saves Lyla from her abusive father, leading to a contract marriage. Misunderstandings over her father's debts clear up when Elias discovers she is working while pregnant. He fiercely defends his wife from school bullies. After Lyla's true identity is revealed, the couple tears up their contract and celebrates with the wedding of the century.

title: Cinta Tak Lagi Tersembunyi
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Putus asa mencari biaya berobat ibunya, mahasiswi miskin Lyla Miller salah masuk kamar dan berurusan dengan Elias Thorne. Nyonya Thorne bersikeras Lyla adalah pasangan yang tepat. Elias lalu menyelamatkan Lyla dari ayahnya yang kasar, yang berujung pada kawin kontrak. Kesalahpahaman terkait utang sang ayah mereda saat Elias tahu Lyla tetap bekerja meski sedang hamil. Elias pun membela istrinya mati-matian dari perundung kampus. Setelah identitas asli Lyla terungkap, mereka membatalkan kontrak tersebut dan menggelar pernikahan abad ini.

title: 契約閃婚：厲少寵妻無度
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: 貧困大學生溫情為湊母醫費誤入房間，意外與厲寒辭糾纏。厲奶奶認定她為孫媳，厲寒辭救下被渣父逼迫的她，二人契約閃婚。婚後因父親揮霍產生誤會，得知她孕中打工後厲寒辭滿心心疼，解開誤會深情守護。入校後屢次被刁難陷害，厲寒辭霸氣護妻。後來溫情身世揭曉。恩怨落幕，兩人撕毀協議，攜手舉辦世紀婚禮圓滿相守。

title: Blood and the Veil: The Maid Returns
genre: Historical, Strong Heroine, Lost Child Reveal, Identity Reveal, Emotional Abuse, Reunion Years Later
synopsis_or_hook: 14 years ago, favoring her grandson Tristan, Dowager Venere drains Elora's frostblood to save him and casts the girl out. Rescued by farmer Thomas Finch, she's raised as Elora Finch. Now, she returns to Venere Manor as a maid. Her mother, Lady Venere, desperately searches for her lost daughter, unaware that the maid she scolds and humiliates is her precious daughter!

title: Reborn as My Kids's Saviour
genre: Reborn, Strong Heroine, Reunion Years Later, Parent Identity Reveal, Secret Reveal, Rebirth
synopsis_or_hook: Lydia dies and finds out she's the tragic ex in some trashy novel—ran off pregnant, died young, and her kids? Just there to make the heroine's perfect kids look good. Her son Cole ends up a thug in prison. Her daughter wrecks her hand going for first violin, loses it, gets dumped. Meanwhile the heroine steals her man and lives happily ever after. Lydia's pissed. Then she wakes up—18 again, but Cole's 17. Fine. She's gonna fix this. Game on.

title: Sângele și vălul: Slujitoarea revine
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Acum 14 ani, pentru a-și salva nepotul, pe Tristan, Văduva Venere îi scurge Elorei sângele de gheață și o izgonește. Salvată de fermierul Thomas Finch, e crescută ca Elora Finch. Acum revine la Conacul Venere ca slujitoare. Mama ei, Lady Venere, o caută disperată, neștiind că fata pe care o umilește e chiar fiica ei!

title: Renăscută ca salvatoarea copiilor mei
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Lydia moare și află că e fosta tragică dintr-un roman de duzină: a fugit însărcinată, a murit tânără, iar copiii ei? Sunt acolo doar ca să-i pună în valoare pe copiii perfecți ai eroinei. Fiul ei, Cole, ajunge la închisoare. Fiica ei își distruge mâna luptând pentru prima vioară, pierde tot și e părăsită. Între timp, eroina îi fură bărbatul și trăiește fericită. Lydia e furioasă. Apoi se trezește — are din nou 18 ani, dar Cole are 17. Perfect. O să repare ea totul. Să înceapă jocul.

title: 18歳のいじめられっ子、実は裏社会も平伏す絶対君主でした
genre: Drama, Royalty/Nobility, Rebirth, Meet Again, Exciting, The Chosen One
synopsis_or_hook: 六国を平定した英雄、摂政王李績。だが皇帝の裏切りにより、現代の気弱な高校生に転生してしまう。前世の記憶と共に目覚めた彼は、いじめっ子を返り討ちにし、かつての許嫁と瓜二つの少女楚嫵と出会う。しかし、彼女の首には邪術が込められたネックレスが……楚家の財産を狙う謎の組織『聖裁会』の陰謀が、二人の運命を狂わせる。絶対的な武力で敵を薙ぎ払い、巨万の富をも手にした彼が本当に望むものとは？前世で果たせなかった約束が、今、始まる。

title: 용옥에서 돌아온 전설
genre: Prison, Dragon, Super Warrior, Super Power, Martial Arts, Heiress/Socialite
synopsis_or_hook: 전설적인 인물 진자광은 용옥에서 10년을 숨죽여 지내다, 출소 전날 밤 수감 동기 당대명으로부터 여동생 당소아를 무사히 지켜달라는 마지막 부탁을 받는다. 진자광은 정체를 숨기기 위해 당가 무관의 청소부가 되지만, 당소아는 도장 깨기를 하러 온 조성민 일당에게 7일 뒤 생사를 건 대결을 강요받는다. 이에 진자광은 암암리에 늙은 청소부를 절세고수로 탈바꿈시킨다. 대결 당일, 늙은 청소부가 사투를 벌이지만 조가에서 데려온 전신을 당해내지 못한다. 절체절명의 순간, 진자광이 진짜 실력을 발휘해 일격에 전신을 물리치고, 7일의 약속은 그가 다시 정상에 오르는 전설의 서막이 된다!

title: 장가갈수록 스탯 떡상
genre: Drama, Strong Heroine, Fantasy, Offbeat, Clever, Urban Legend
synopsis_or_hook: 반백 살의 이영준은 난세 속에서 시스템 빨로 강제 회춘하고, 여러 미녀를 만나게 된다. 난세에서 살아남기 위해 이영준은 중상을 입은 여장군 임태연와 거래를 맺는다. 이후 남장을 한 임태연와 함께 군영으로 잠입해, 농부의 신분에서 천하를 호령하는 대장군으로 거듭나며, 본격적인 천하쟁패의 서막을 연다.

title: 내 것으로 차지하다
genre: Romance, Sweet Romance, Second Chance, Modern, Regrettable, Charming
synopsis_or_hook: 남주시 최고 재벌가 상속녀 강나영. 가장 행복해야 할 생일날, 자신을 범하려던 하재우를 실수로 죽이고 하루아침에 감옥에 갇힌다. 몇 년 뒤 출소했으나 세상은 완전히 변해 있었고, 연모했던 담백현마저 그녀를 아예 모르는 사람처럼 차갑게 외면한다. 밑바닥 수모 속에서 복수의 칼날을 갈던 나영은 가장 절망적인 순간 뜻밖의 진실을 마주한다. 담백현은 냉혈한이 아니었다. 그저 어둠 속에서 지독한 순정을 감춘 채, 그녀 앞을 가로막는 모든 장애물을 남몰래 치워주고 있었을 뿐. 마침내 오해가 풀린 두 사람은 상처뿐인 과거를 뒤로한 채 함께 찬란한 새 삶을 향해 나아간다.

title: 絶世の風華～虐げられた母を救う、エリートたちの狂騒曲～
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: 若くして学業を諦め、自分の身を粉にして弟妹を育て上げた周瀾。時は流れ、父の古希の祝いの席に質素な身なりで現れた彼女は、恩を忘れた弟妹や親族たちから一族の恥とばかりに容赦ない嘲笑と屈辱を受ける。しかし、彼らは知らなかった。目の前のみすぼらしいオバサンが、巨大企業瑞麗グループの会長であることを。親族たちの暴言がピークに達したその時、彼女の3人の子供たちが姿を現す。各界のトップに君臨する彼らが、母をコケにした者たちに容赦ない鉄槌を下す！さらに物語は思わぬ方向へ。

title: Mahar Mahal, Kehilangan Pewaris Miliarder
genre: Drama, Family Drama, Mom-and-Son, Eye-opening, Regrettable, Office Worker
synopsis_or_hook: Tiga tahun lamanya Gavin Wright membiayai hidup kekasihnya, Mandy Parker. Di hari pernikahan mereka, Mandy yang kini bekerja di Grup Sewell bergengsi menguji Gavin dengan menuntut mahar fantastis dan menghinanya di depan umum. Muak dengan hal itu, Gavin membatalkan pernikahan mereka. Tanpa Mandy ketahui, Gavin adalah putra CEO Grup Sewell yang telah lama hilang. Keesokan harinya, Mandy sangat terkejut saat tahu Gavin kini menjadi Manajer Umum Grup Sewell sekaligus bos langsungnya.

title: Người Yêu Cũ Là Sếp
genre: Drama, Family Drama, Mom-and-Son, Eye-opening, Regrettable, Office Worker
synopsis_or_hook: Gavin Wright đã dành ba năm chu cấp cho bạn gái Mandy Parker. Trong ngày cưới, Mandy, lúc này đang làm việc ở Tập đoàn Sewell danh tiếng, đã đòi sính lễ khổng lồ và công khai sỉ nhục anh. Quá sức chịu đựng, Gavin quyết định hủy hôn. Cô đâu ngờ anh lại là đứa con thất lạc của CEO Tập đoàn Sewell. Hôm sau, Mandy bàng hoàng khi biết anh giờ là tổng giám đốc Tập đoàn Sewell, cũng chính là sếp trực tiếp của cô.

title: After the Reformatory, My Family Begs Me Home
genre: Drama, Family Drama, Modern, Dysfunctional-Family, Visually Striking, Emotional
synopsis_or_hook: When the Blaires turn Elena, the black sheep of the family, into a scapegoat to cover for their adoptive daughter's crimes, she is sent to a reform school to be tortured. Three years later, on the eve of her release, Elena just wants a fresh start—but her evil family has other plans.

title: Claimed by the Cursed Kingdom
genre: Servant, Immortal, Heiress/Socialite, Damsel, Royalty/Nobility, Fated Lovers
synopsis_or_hook:
On her eighteenth birthday, Zara finally awakens the power that has been sealed inside her since childhood.
For fifteen years, she has lived as a castless servant in House Greth—mocked, controlled, and humiliated by Lord Rowan, the man fate itself chose for her. But when their sacred bond appears, Rowan rejects her in front of the gods and throws her away like she was never worth loving.
Then Lord Theron Blackwell arrives.
Cold, powerful, and feared by every house in the realm, Theron sees what everyone else refuses to see: Zara is not a servant. She is the missing heir of a destroyed bloodline, the daughter of House Solenne, and the bearer of a divine gift powerful enough to expose every lie in the kingdom.
Now Rowan wants her back. Isolde wants her ruined. And the council wants proof.
But Zara is done begging for a place in someone else’s world.
The rejected girl is about to become the woman every house fears.

title: استيقظ التنين في داخلي
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: بعد أن خانته طليقته وجردته من ممتلكاته، وتخلت عنه مع ابنة تحتضر بسرطان الدم، يصل ليام بلاكوود إلى الحضيض. وحين تلاشت الآمال، توقظ قلادة دريك الأثرية طاقته الكامنة. ينهض من تحت الرماد بصفته وريث دريك، ليبرئ المستعصي بلمسة، ويسحق العظام بخطوة. والآن، متسلحا بمهارة طبية خارقة وقوة قتالية فذة وتعطش عارم للانتقام، يعود ليام إلى مدينة إيفريت.. لا ليستجدي، بل ليدفن أعداءه.

title: حبيبي السابق هو مديري
genre: Drama, Family Drama, Mom-and-Son, Eye-opening, Regrettable, Office Worker
synopsis_or_hook: دعم غافين رايت حبيبته ماندي باركر مالياً لثلاث سنوات. وفي يوم زفافهما، قررت ماندي، الموظفة في مجموعة سيويل المرموقة، اختباره بطلب مهر ضخم وإهانته علناً. سئم غافين من ذلك وألغى الزفاف. ما لم تكن تعرفه هو أنه الابن المفقود للرئيس التنفيذي للمجموعة. وفي اليوم التالي، تُصدم ماندي باكتشافها أنه المدير العام الجديد ومديرها المباشر.

title: Eski Sevgilim Patronum
genre: Drama, Family Drama, Mom-and-Son, Eye-opening, Regrettable, Office Worker
synopsis_or_hook: Gavin Wright, üç yıl boyunca kız arkadaşı Mandy Parker'a maddi destek sağlar. Düğün günlerinde, artık seçkin Sewell Grubu'nda çalışan Mandy, ondan yüklü bir başlık parası isteyip herkesin içinde aşağılayarak sabrını sınar. Canına tak eden Gavin düğünü iptal eder. Fakat Mandy, Gavin'in Sewell Grubu CEO'sunun yıllardır kayıp olan oğlu olduğundan tamamen habersizdir. Ertesi gün, şirketinin yeni genel müdürü, yani doğrudan kendi patronu olarak karşısında Gavin'i gören Mandy hayatının şokunu yaşar.

title: Reddedilmekten Milyardere
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Kötü geçen bir buluşmanın ardından Ryan, Asi Kızlar Sistemini etkinleştirir. Ödüllerin kilidini açmak için asi kızların sevgisini kazanması gerekmektedir. Sınırsız bir servet onu bekliyor!

title: من مرفوض إلى ملياردير
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: بعد موعد كارثي، يفعّل رايان نظام الفتيات المتمردات، ليكسب حبهن ويحصد المكافآت. ثروة طائلة بانتظاره!

title: ค่ำคืนต้องห้ามกับคุณพ่ออัลฟ่า
genre: Griffin Blazi, Bailee Miner, Candace Malinowski, Kendra Blanco, Alpha, Billionaire
synopsis_or_hook: ไลร่า โอเมก้าไร้หมาป่าที่ใครก็ตราหน้าว่าไร้ค่า นึกไม่ถึงว่าต้องย้ายเข้าบ้าน เดมอน อัลฟ่าที่เธอแอบรัก ซึ่งเป็นทั้งพ่อของเพื่อนสนิทและเพื่อนรักของพ่อเธอ ยิ่งใกล้ชิด ความปรารถนาก็ยิ่งห้ามใจไม่อยู่ แม้รู้ว่าเขาไม่มีวันมองโอเมก้าแคระแกร็น แต่เมื่อสัมผัสต้องห้ามเกิดขึ้น ความจริงก็เริ่มเปิดเผย หรือเขาว่าคือคู่แห่งโชคชะตาของเธอกันแน่

title: Alpha Daddy, Faça-me sua
genre: Griffin Blazi, Bailee Miner, Candace Malinowski, Kendra Blanco, Alpha, Billionaire
synopsis_or_hook: Lyra, uma ômega sem lobo, sempre foi considerada a rejeitada da ninhada. Mas ela nunca imaginou que, neste verão, ao voltar para a casa do alfa por quem secretamente é apaixonada há muito tempo — o Alfa Damon — ele também seria o pai da sua melhor amiga! Em casa, ela já não consegue mais conter seus desejos acumulados por tanto tempo — eles vão explodir. Ela fantasia sobre Alfa Damon tirando sua virgindade e fica sonhando com ele, mesmo sabendo que um alfa como Damon nunca se apaixonaria por uma ômega como ela. Além disso, Damon é o melhor amigo do seu pai! Quando finalmente um toque proibido acontece, a verdade lentamente vem à tona... será que eles são parceiros predestinados?

title: Papi Alfa, hazme tuya
genre: Griffin Blazi, Bailee Miner, Candace Malinowski, Kendra Blanco, Alpha, Billionaire
synopsis_or_hook: Lyra, una Omega sin lobo, siempre fue considerada la oveja negra. Pero nunca se imaginó que durante el verano, al mudarse de vuelta a la casa del Alfa Damon, de quien ha estado secretamente enamorada desde hace mucho tiempo, éste resultaría ser el papá de su mejor amiga. En casa, no puede contener más el deseo que ha acumulado durante tanto tiempo y explota. Fantasea con Alfa Damon quitándole su virginidad, sueña con él, incluso cuando sabe que un Alfa como Damon jamás se enamoraría de una Omega como ella. Además, Damon es el papá de su mejor amiga. Cuando al fin se tocan, la verdad lentamente sale a la luz. ¿Podrían ser... una pareja predestinada?

title: 親友のパパは運命の番！？
genre: Griffin Blazi, Bailee Miner, Candace Malinowski, Kendra Blanco, Alpha, Billionaire
synopsis_or_hook:
ライラは狼になれない落ちこぼれオメガ。この夏、ずっと片思いしていたアルファ、デイモンの家に身を寄せることに。しかし、なんと彼は親友のパパだった！
絶対に無理だと分かっているのに、同居生活で長年の欲望が爆発し、彼に「初めて」を奪われる妄想が止まらない。
そしてついに、二人が禁断の触れ合いを持った時、真実が明らかになる……もしかして二人は運命の番！？

title: Amoureuse du père Alpha de mon amie
genre: Griffin Blazi, Bailee Miner, Candace Malinowski, Kendra Blanco, Alpha, Billionaire
synopsis_or_hook: Lyra, l'Oméga sans loup, a toujours été rejetée. De retour chez Alpha Damon, l'homme qu'elle aime en secret depuis des années, elle découvre qu'il est aussi le père de sa meilleure amie. Entre attirance interdite, secrets de famille et destin imprévisible, une question demeure : sont-ils des âmes sœurs ?

title: Die verbotene Omega des Alpha
genre: Griffin Blazi, Bailee Miner, Candace Malinowski, Kendra Blanco, Alpha, Billionaire
synopsis_or_hook:
Die wolfslose Omega Lyra wurde schon immer als unerwünschter Winzling abgestempelt. Doch sie hätte nie gedacht, dass sie diesen Sommer ausgerechnet wieder in das Haus des Alphas ziehen würde, für den sie schon lange heimlich schwärmt: Alpha Damon. Noch dazu ist er der Vater ihrer besten Freundin!
Unter Damons Dach kann Lyra ihre jahrelang unterdrückte Sehnsucht nicht länger zurückhalten – sie bricht mit voller Wucht hervor. Sie fantasiert davon, dass Alpha Damon ihr die Jungfräulichkeit nimmt, träumt von ihm und weiß doch zugleich, dass ein Alpha wie Damon sich niemals in eine Omega wie sie verlieben würde. Außerdem ist Damon der beste Freund ihres Vaters.
Als es schließlich zu einer verbotenen Berührung zwischen ihnen kommt, tritt die Wahrheit langsam ans Licht … Könnte es sein, dass sie füreinander bestimmt sind?

title: Belenggu Cinta Pemimpin Klan
genre: Griffin Blazi, Bailee Miner, Candace Malinowski, Kendra Blanco, Alpha, Billionaire
synopsis_or_hook: Terlahir sebagai manusia serigala cacat, Lyra selalu dianggap lemah dan tidak diinginkan. Namun musim panas ini, dia harus tinggal serumah dengan Damon, pemimpin klan yang diam-diam dia taksir. Rumitnya, Damon adalah sahabat karib ayahnya sekaligus ayah dari sahabatnya sendiri! Saat sentuhan terlarang akhirnya terjadi. Mungkinkah mereka sebenarnya pasangan sejati yang ditakdirkan?

title: Tatusiu alfa, chcę być twoja
genre: Griffin Blazi, Bailee Miner, Candace Malinowski, Kendra Blanco, Alpha, Billionaire
synopsis_or_hook: Lyra, omega bez wilka, przez całe życie była nazywana słabą i niechcianą. Nigdy jednak nie przypuszczała, że tego lata, gdy ponownie zamieszka w domu alfy Damona — mężczyzny, w którym od dawna skrycie się podkochuje — odkryje, że jest on także ojcem jej najlepszej przyjaciółki! Przebywając z nim pod jednym dachem, nie potrafi już dłużej tłumić swoich pragnień. Fantazjuje o Damonie, śni o nim i coraz bardziej zatraca się w uczuciach, choć wie, że alfa taki jak on nigdy nie zainteresowałby się omegą taką jak ona. Jakby tego było mało, Damon jest również najlepszym przyjacielem jej ojca! Kiedy w końcu dochodzi do zakazanego zbliżenia, zaczyna wychodzić na jaw prawda, która może zmienić wszystko... Czy to możliwe, że są sobie przeznaczeni?

title: 알파 대디, 날 가져
genre: Griffin Blazi, Bailee Miner, Candace Malinowski, Kendra Blanco, Alpha, Billionaire
synopsis_or_hook: 오메가 리라는 늘 버림받은 약골이라 불렸다. 그런데 올여름, 오랫동안 짝사랑한 알파 데이먼의 집에 이사 갔는데, 그가 절친의 아빠였다! 오래 참은 욕망이 터져 리라는 데이먼에게 첫날밤을 빼앗기는 환상을 꿈꾼다. 그런 알파가 자신 같은 오메가를 사랑할 리 없고, 게다가 아빠 절친이기도 하다. 마침내 금지된 스킨십 후 진실이 드러난다. 혹시 둘이 운명인가?

title: Prohlášení od Alpha I Hate
genre: Griffin Blazi, Sully Christian, Madeleine Rocha-Barnette, Rachel Goodwin, Fantasy, Young Adult
synopsis_or_hook: Daisy Storm celý život netušila, v čem je problém. Proč se nedokáže proměnit? Proč nemá vlčí podobu? I když ji celá smečka nenáviděla, Daisy si původně myslela, že má alespoň svého partnera – toho Alfu… až do dne, kdy ji v den jejích osmnáctých narozenin zradil a zrušil jejich partnerskou smlouvu, čímž se nová Luna stala právě ta, která ji kdysi nejvíc šikanovala. Se slzami v očích utekla z domova, ale pouhých šest měsíců poté její matka záhadně zemřela a nový Alfa, který převzal moc – Nolan Fenrir, kterého považovala za hlavního viníka smrti své matky – jí nařídil, aby se vrátila do smečky. Přísahala, že mu nikdy neodpustí vše, co udělal, a přesto…  Daisy cítila, že ji Alfa Nolan přitahuje, a ten pocit byl tak nepřirozený; ačkoli se tvářil chladně, z nějakého důvodu se zdálo, že cítí totéž. Nemůže snad uzavřít další partnerskou smlouvu? A to navíc s mužem, kterého nejvíc nenávidí?!

title: İÇİNDEKİ EJDERİN UYANIŞI
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Eski eşinin ihanetine uğrayan, elindeki her şeyi kaybeden ve lösemi hastası kızıyla bir başına kalan Liam Blackwood dibe vurmuştur. Ancak tüm umutlar tükenmişken, kadim bir ejderha kolyesi içindeki gücü uyandırır. Drake Varisi olarak küllerinden doğan Liam, artık tek bir dokunuşla amansız hastalıkları iyileştiriyor, tek bir adımıyla kemikleri kırıp geçiyor. Şimdi ise ilahi düzeyde tıp bilgisi, eşsiz dövüş yetenekleri ve sönmeyen bir intikam ateşiyle Everett Şehri'ne dönüyor; yalvarmak için değil, düşmanlarını gömmek için.

title: The Empress's Final Wish
genre: Historical, Strong Heroine, Meet Again, Identity Reveal, Female Empowerment, Multiple Identities
synopsis_or_hook: On her deathbed, Empress Rosa clings to life over an unfulfilled wish, while her three sons ruthlessly vie for the throne. Meanwhile, Celeste arrives to help the Empress. Dismissed by the skeptical princes, Celeste enters the palace, where the dying Empress miraculously revives, kneels, and addresses her as her lady...

title: Saat Maharani Berlutut Padaku
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Di ranjang kematiannya, Ratu Rosa terus bertahan hidup demi sebuah harapan yang belum terwujud, sementara ketiga putranya saling sikut memperebutkan takhta. Saat Celeste datang menawarkan bantuan, para pangeran justru meremehkannya. Namun, ketika Celeste melangkah masuk istana, keajaiban terjadi. Sang Ratu yang sekarat tiba-tiba bangkit, berlutut, dan memanggilnya sebagai majikan...

title: Immortal Grandpa Goes Viral!
synopsis_or_hook: Back from seclusion, cultivator Leonard stuns the internet—joining his live-streamer great-granddaughter to show off real magic!

title: Don't Cry When I Move On
synopsis_or_hook: The hidden CEO is heartbroken when his girlfriend rejects his proposal for his impostor, but he will make her regret!

title: Martial Gallop Life
synopsis_or_hook: Gabriel, a boxing legend turned devoted single dad as "Quentin", must resurrect his fierce past when danger threatens his daughter!

title: Eternal Night
synopsis_or_hook: When an amnesiac Demon Lord falls for his mortal savior, their love is torn apart by a ruthless rival—until his powers return, and vengeance erupts in flames!

title: My CEO Wife
synopsis_or_hook: Aaron Chapman, the Undefeated Overlord, emerges from five years of seclusion in the Celestial Mountains to fulfill his engagement to Faye Lewis. Keeping his true identity a secret, Aaron faces Faye's rejection due to his apparent lack of status

title: I am the Legendary Physician
synopsis_or_hook: I am so good at medicine... I can cure mermaids and even revive my dead mother!

title: Reborn Villainess: Healing Hearts, Breaking Walls
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Aria, a kind-hearted veterinary intern, wakes up inside a novel — as a despised character in the beast-shifter world, who was cruel to her four bound spirit beasts. Now the entire tribe laughs at her. Then the system activates. With one mission: use spiritual soothing to cure her four mates. They glare. They reject. They push her away. But Aria is a vet. She has never met an animal she couldn't heal...

title: Largué. Activer Ladyaid.
genre: Harem, Damsel Rescue, Intense Sexual Tension, Sabotaging, Competition, Comeback
synopsis_or_hook: Maxime Sauzet, modeste livreur, finance les études de sa petite amie Claire Gauthier. Diplômée, celle-ci le quitte pour un riche héritier et l'humilie avant de disparaître. Brisé, Maxime active par accident le système « Gentleman Bienfaiteur » : chaque femme aidée lui rapporte des récompenses décuplées. Il aide Élise Chenier, Chantal Didier, Sylvie Dubois, passant de livreur à propriétaire d'une villa, directeur du restaurant Raphël, puis actionnaire majoritaire du cabinet Certal. Claire refait surface avec Louis Guérin pour le piéger. Grâce aux témoignages d'Élise et des femmes qu'il a aidées, ainsi qu'au soutien du docteur Florent Lefèvre, Maxime est blanchi et gagne l'amour sincère d'Élise Chenier.

title: The Return of the Wraith King
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Caleb is the discarded son of a declining house—weak, overlooked, and written off by all. But when his sister Elara faces death, he reveals a terrifying truth: he is the reincarnation of the Wraith King, the most powerful being in the Caelian Empire. As the traitorous Graves family and the ancient Fiendkin rise to shatter the centuries-old seal, Caleb must unite the rival Wraithmaster clans, command legendary spirits like the Twin Reapers, and ascend to the legendary Abyssal Sovereign realm...

title: CEO Dingin Jadi Bucinku
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook:
Demi melunasi hutang dan mengubah hidupnya, Daisy setuju menjalani pernikahan kontrak selama satu tahun dengan Julian Sterling, konglomerat dingin yang sangat berkuasa.

Sebagai imbalannya, Daisy harus berpura-pura menjadi istri sempurna di depan semua orang. Tapi semakin lama mereka berakting sebagai pasangan suami istri, semakin sulit membedakan mana pura-pura dan mana perasaan yang sebenarnya.

Dan tanpa sadar, salah satu dari mereka jatuh cinta terlebih dahulu.

title: Our Love, Built on Lies
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Forced to spy on heir Lucien to pay her father’s debts, Elara finds herself trapped in a web of betrayal, lost love, and tragic loss. After the truth of her noble lineage surfaces, she must face a vindictive rival and a complicated past. Amidst power struggles and life-threatening danger, can Lucien’s ultimate sacrifice heal their broken bond?

title: Cinta di Atas Dusta
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Terpaksa memata-matai Lucien sang pewaris demi melunasi utang ayahnya, Elara justru terjebak dalam pengkhianatan, duka, dan cinta yang kandas. Saat identitas aslinya sebagai pewaris keluarga terpandang terungkap, ia harus menghadapi saingan pendendam dan masa lalu yang rumit. Di tengah perebutan kekuasaan dan ancaman maut, mampukah pengorbanan terbesar Lucien menyatukan kembali cinta mereka?

title: Apocalisse: invincibile dopo aver baciato il capo
synopsis_or_hook: Apocalisse? Rilassati! La mia ragazza e capo è un'Aberrante SSS!

title: Il mio potere segreto: HP infiniti
synopsis_or_hook: In un mondo trasformato in un videogioco in cui i talenti si risvegliano, Frank, liceale squattrinato, nasconde un segreto: può curarsi all'infinito. Pur di ottenere il Risveglio di Classe, baratta anni di vita per del denaro, diventando un Mago Hexcraft di grado SSS. Un talento così raro lo rende subito un bersaglio, ma grazie al suo potere segreto, gli HP infiniti, Frank accrescerà la sua forza e annienterà ogni nemico.

title: A 65 anni corteggio donne per diventare immortale
synopsis_or_hook: Partenza dal cimitero. Aspettativa di vita: 3 giorni. Ethan Warren si risveglia in un corpo morente, bloccato alla Raffinazione del Qi, finché uno spietato Sistema non gli offre una via di scampo: assorbire yin per salvarsi. Con tre mogli e il tempo agli sgoccioli, si rifugia tra i monti per tentare il tutto per tutto con la doppia coltivazione.

title: Arena del Destino: Ascesa del Dio Demone
synopsis_or_hook: In un mondo che ha scordato i suoi dèi, Ethan Hayes risveglia un'affinità alla Stirpe Demoniaca di grado SSS e ricordi che nessun altro ha. Nonostante i dubbi altrui, evoca le divinità perdute di Huaxia e sventa invasioni da ogni fronte, innescando la guerra dei veri nomi.

title: Risveglio Globale: Sono il Flagello dei Non Morti
synopsis_or_hook: I mostri attaccano. Il mondo si risveglia. Ethan Locke diventa un Negromante senza limiti. Nessun tempo di ricarica. I danni non lo sfiorano. Raggio d'azione? Infinito. Quando scoppia la Guerra delle Nazioni, le sue legioni di non morti sorgono a chilometri di distanza... e trasformano il campo di battaglia in un vero inferno.

title: Innamorarsi per contratto
synopsis_or_hook: Incastrata in uno scandalo dalla matrigna, Grace Collins diventa virale all'improvviso. Per salvarsi, stipula un matrimonio per contratto... con un paziente appena conosciuto.

title: Un maestro OP dal basso profilo
synopsis_or_hook: Catapultato nel mondo della coltivazione, Adrian Grant sembra un modesto coltivatore della Formazione del Nucleo... ma cela dieci anni di potere del Sistema di Check-in. Nell'ombra, rende i discepoli delle leggende con il Tè dell'Illuminazione e l'Elisir d'Oro delle Nove Forme, finché la guerra non travolge la Provincia di Arcadia.

title: L'ascesa del caduto: la mia rivincita
synopsis_or_hook: Un tempo fiero Santo, August Cross finisce per diventare il burattino della Santa. Ma una ciotola rotta cambia tutto, trasformando gli scarti in tesori! Al Gran Torneo annienta il rivale Alexander Lawson e riabilita il suo nome! Provocato dalla Santa e sedotto dall'affascinante capo della setta, August ottiene tutto: potere assoluto e donne bellissime.

title: Mai più immortale: ho scelto la famiglia
synopsis_or_hook: Nella vita precedente, Audric James era un mascalzone. Pur di frequentare i ricchi figli di papà, portò la famiglia alla bancarotta, causando la morte della sorella e il suicidio della madre. Salvato da un maestro, divenne il temuto Signore Celeste. A un passo dall'immortalità, ha scelto di ricominciare da capo. Al risveglio nell'ospedale dov'è ricoverata sua madre, si ritrova nei panni del reietto di un tempo. Ma questa volta userà i suoi poteri per sfidare il destino e cambiare tutto!

title: その運転手を怒らせるな――正体はSSS級ボディーガード
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: 両親を失い、巨大グループの存続と己の命、その両方を狙われる美しき令嬢、姜梨。彼女の元に現れたのは、一見、頼りない運転手の陳良。だが、次々と襲い来る暗殺者を冷徹に排除し、社内に潜む裏切り者を暴き出す彼の姿は、ただの運転手ではなかった。背後で糸を引くのは、姜氏グループの全てを狙うライバル社の御曹司、林浩。絶体絶命の危機が迫る時、謎の運転手がその恐るべき正体を現す。彼はいったい何者なのか？そして、巨大な陰謀の先に、二人が見るものとは──

title: ยอดบอดี้การ์ด SSS
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: เจียงหลีสูญเสียพ่อแม่ เจียงกรุ๊ปเผชิญวิกฤต เฉินเหลียงยอดฝีมือแฝงตัวเป็นคนขับรถ เขาสยบการลอบสังหารและจับหนอนบ่อนไส้ตระกูลหลินที่จ้องฮุบบริษัท ในยามคับขันเขาเผยตัวตนจริง พลิกวิกฤต ทำลายแผนร้าย และปกป้องเจียงหลีไว้ได้อย่างงดงาม

title: 제왕의 귀환
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: 진경지는 세간에 정체를 숨긴 채, 오직 가족을 지키며 평온하게 살기를 바랐다. 그래서 과거의 명성은 바람에 묻고, 오늘날의 따뜻함은 오직 가족만을 위해 쏟았다. 하지만 딸에게 갑작스러운 시련이 닥쳤고, 진경지는 더 이상 침묵하지 않기로 결심한다. 이 소식을 듣고 달려온 옛 벗들과 함께하며, 진경지의 압도적인 위용이 다시금 모습을 드러낸다. 그는 굳건한 초심과 선의를 품고, 자신의 모든 힘을 다해 가족의 평화로운 일상을 지켜낼 것이다.

title: Suamiku Sayang, Bangkrutlah Saja
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Setelah mati kelelahan bekerja, Sasha terbangun dalam sebuah novel sebagai istri malang Emmett. Terobsesi buta pada sang suami miliarder hingga diasingkan ke luar negeri, nasib Sasha yang dulu berakhir tragis. Namun kali ini, Sasha menemukan celah di perjanjian pranikah demi bertahan hidup: jika Emmett bangkrut, keluarganya akan memaksa mereka cerai. Kini, ia siap membuat suaminya bangkrut!

title: My Dear Husband, Please Go Bankrupt
genre: Billionaire, Rom-Com, Space-Travel, Divorce, Misunderstanding, Business
synopsis_or_hook: After dying from overwork, Sasha wakes up in a novel as the doomed wife of Emmett. Toxically obsessed with her billionaire husband and eventually banished abroad, the old Sasha had a bad end. But this time, Sasha finds a prenup loophole to save her life: if Emmett goes bankrupt, his family will force a divorce. Now she's ready to bankrupt her husband!

title: 老公，請你破產吧
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: 996社畜許呦呦加班猝死，穿書成了爽文男主江庭的炮灰前妻。原主是超級戀愛腦，對男主有病態的佔有慾，結局慘被首富老公江庭發配西非挖煤。因限制無法離婚的她為了保命翻遍婚前協議發現唯一漏洞：只要江庭破產，家族就會強制離婚。生性倒黴的許呦呦狂喜：這題我會！不就是敗家嗎？為了自由，老公請你破產吧！從此許呦呦開啟散財童子模式，專挑必死項目閉眼投。誰知倒黴體質負負得正，竟觸發了無敵的反向金手指…

title: Străini prin destin
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: După ce își pierde memoria salvându-și prietenul din copilărie, pe Oliver, dintr-un incendiu, Rita Tolman este adoptată și devine Rita Parrilla. Ani mai târziu, Oliver construiește un parc de distracții imens pentru a o găsi, însă Rita și tatăl ei se opun din cauza unui teren. Reîntâlniți ca străini, se înfruntă fără să-și dea seama cine sunt cu adevărat. Cine știe unde îi va duce destinul?

title: Strangers by Fate
genre: Billionaire, Mistaken Identity, Romance, Toxic Romance, Reunion Years Later, Reunion as Strangers
synopsis_or_hook: After losing her memory saving childhood friend Oliver in a fire, Rita Tolman is adopted and becomes Rita Parrilla. Years later, Oliver builds a massive amusement park to find her, only to be blocked by Rita and her father in a land dispute. Reunited as strangers, they clash without realizing their true identities. Who knows what fate will lead them to?

title: The Dragon's Contract Bride
genre: Reborn, Revenge, Engagement Breakup, Getting Back at Ex, Competition, Reverse Harem
synopsis_or_hook: In a world where humans and dragons coexist, dragonkind—though capable of taking human form—are inherently violent and must rely on the magic of human women to suppress their frenzy. To secure power and compete for the throne, Dragon Lord candidates enter marriage pacts with women from powerful magical families. Anastasia, born into one such family and gifted with immense magic, once devoted her life to helping her husband Dmitri rise to the throne—only to be betrayed by him and her own sister, and die a tragic death in prison. On the brink of death, she casts a forbidden spell and is reborn on the eve of his proposal. This time, she refuses to be a pawn—she will rewrite her fate and take revenge on those who destroyed her.

title: Menolak Jadi Pengantin Raja Naga
genre: Playing Dumb
synopsis_or_hook: Di dunia tempat manusia dan naga berdampingan, bangsa naga—meski berwujud manusia—pada dasarnya beringas dan butuh sihir wanita manusia untuk meredam amukannya. Demi takhta, kandidat Penguasa Naga membuat perjanjian pernikahan dengan wanita dari keluarga sihir kuat. Anastasia yang terlahir dengan sihir luar biasa mengabdikan hidupnya agar sang suami, Dmitri, naik takhta. Namun, ia dikhianati suami serta saudara perempuannya dan mati tragis di penjara. Di ambang kematian, ia merapal mantra terlarang dan terlahir kembali tepat pada malam sebelum Dmitri melamarnya. Kali ini, ia menolak jadi bidak. Ia akan mengubah takdir dan membalas dendam pada mereka yang telah menghancurkannya.

title: He's the Rulebreaker
genre: Morality, Animation, Strong-Willed, Suspenseful, Offbeat, Quirky
